pythonCopier le code#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Minimal HTTP server for Project Intake Pack
Allows uploading of project documents (brief, cahier des charges, idГ©e, etc.)
and setting of assistant level.
Compatible with Python вүҘ3.12 (no cgi dependency)
"""

import json, os
from pathlib import Path
from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
from urllib.parse import parse_qs

PORT = 8090

DOCUMENT_TYPES = [
    {"id": "brief", "label": "Brief de projet"},
    {"id": "spec", "label": "Cahier des charges"},
    {"id": "idea", "label": "IdГ©e gГ©nГ©rale"},
    {"id": "report", "label": "Rapport dвҖҷanalyse"},
]

ASSIST_LEVELS = {
    0: "Installation assistГ©e (aucune action sans validation)",
    1: "Full auto (lвҖҷIA agit seule selon les rГЁgles du scГ©nario)"
}

# --------------------------
# Utilities
# --------------------------
def ensure_dirs(root: Path):
    for d in ["uploads", "runtime"]:
        (root / d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def write_json(path: Path, obj):
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(obj, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)


# --------------------------
# HTTP Handler
# --------------------------
class ProjectIntakeHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):

    def _json(self, code, obj):
        self.send_response(code)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2).encode("utf-8"))

    def do_GET(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parents[1]

        if self.path == "/" or self.path == "/index.html":
            html = (root / "ui" / "index.html")
            if html.exists():
                self.send_response(200)
                self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(html.read_bytes())
                return
            else:
                self.send_error(404, "UI not found")
                return

        elif self.path == "/api/document_types":
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "data": DOCUMENT_TYPES})

        elif self.path == "/api/assistant/levels":
            data = [{"id": k, "label": v} for k, v in ASSIST_LEVELS.items()]
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "data": data})

        elif self.path == "/api/status":
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ready", "msg": "Server running on port %s" % PORT})

        self.send_error(404, "Not Found")

    # --------------------------
    # Upload Endpoint
    # --------------------------
    def do_POST(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parents[1]
        ensure_dirs(root)

        # ---------- 1. Upload document ----------
        if self.path == "/api/project/upload":
            content_type = self.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
            if not content_type.startswith("multipart/form-data"):
                return self._json(400, {"status": "error", "message": "multipart/form-data required"})

            boundary = content_type.split("boundary=")[-1]
            data = self.rfile.read(int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0)))

            parts = data.split(b"--" + boundary.encode())
            filename = None
            doc_type = "unknown"
            file_content = None

            for part in parts:
                if b"Content-Disposition" not in part:
                    continue
                header, _, body = part.partition(b"\r\n\r\n")
                header_str = header.decode(errors="ignore")

                if "name=\"file\"" in header_str:
                    import re
                    m = re.search(r'filename="([^"]+)"', header_str)
                    if m:
                        filename = m.group(1)
                    file_content = body.strip(b"\r\n")
                elif "name=\"doc_type\"" in header_str:
                    doc_type = body.decode(errors="ignore").strip().replace("\r", "").replace("\n", "")

            if not filename or not file_content:
                return self._json(400, {"status": "error", "message": "no file detected"})

            upload_dir = root / "uploads"
            upload_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
            dest = upload_dir / filename
            with open(dest, "wb") as f:
                f.write(file_content)

            meta_path = root / "runtime" / "intake.json"
            payload = {"files": []}
            if meta_path.exists():
                payload = json.loads(meta_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            payload["files"].append({
                "name": filename,
                "path": str(dest),
                "type": doc_type,
                "size": len(file_content)
            })
            write_json(meta_path, payload)

            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "message": f"{filename} uploaded", "doc_type": doc_type})

        # ---------- 2. Assistant level ----------
        elif self.path == "/api/assistant/level":
            length = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0))
            data = json.loads(self.rfile.read(length) or "{}")
            level = data.get("level", 0)
            meta = {"assistant_level": level}
            write_json(Path(root, "runtime/assistant.json"), meta)
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "selected": ASSIST_LEVELS.get(level, "unknown")})

        # ---------- 3. Dummy task polling (mock) ----------
        elif self.path.startswith("/api/tasks/next"):
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "task": None})

        else:
            self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Unknown endpoint"})


# --------------------------
# Main
# --------------------------
def run_server():
    root = Path(__file__).parents[1]
    ensure_dirs(root)
    httpd = HTTPServer(("", PORT), ProjectIntakeHandler)
    print(f"рҹ“Ғ Project Intake server listening on http://localhost:{PORT}")
    print(f"рҹ“Ӯ Upload dir: {root / 'uploads'}")
    httpd.serve_forever()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_server()

1) Remplace server.py par la version correcte (pipeline + debug)
Copie-colle tel quel :
bashCopier le codecd ~/Dropbox/PROJETS/__EURKAI/FULLAUTO

cat > project_intake_pack/http/server.py <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json, os, re
from pathlib import Path
from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
from ..core.meta_call import meta_call
from ..core.pipeline import run_pipeline

PORT = int(os.environ.get("INTAKE_PORT", "8090"))

def ensure_dirs(root: Path):
    for d in ["uploads", "runtime", "run", "ui", "catalogs", "repo"]:
        (root / d).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def read_json(path: Path, default):
    try: return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except: return default

def write_json(path: Path, data):
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

class App(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def _json(self, code, obj):
        self.send_response(code)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8"))

    def do_GET(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parents[1]
        ensure_dirs(root)
        if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"):
            html = root / "ui/index.html"
            if html.exists():
                self.send_response(200); self.send_header("Content-Type","text/html; charset=utf-8"); self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(html.read_bytes()); return
            self.send_error(404, "UI not found"); return
        if self.path == "/api/document_types":
            cfg = read_json(root / "catalogs/document_types.json", {"types":[]})
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","data":cfg.get("types",[])})
        if self.path == "/api/status":
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ready","with_pipeline":True})
        if self.path == "/api/run/results":
            res = read_json(root / "run/results.json", {"executed":[]})
            rep = read_json(root / "run/report.json", {"created":[],"updated":[],"notes":[]})
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","mga":res,"pipeline":rep})
        if self.path == "/api/debug":
            return self._json(200, {
              "assistant": read_json(root / "runtime/assistant.json", {}),
              "intake": read_json(root / "runtime/intake.json", {}),
              "version":"with_pipeline_v1"
            })
        self.send_error(404, "Not Found")

    def do_POST(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parents[1]
        ensure_dirs(root)

        if self.path == "/api/assistant/level":
            ln = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0))
            data = json.loads(self.rfile.read(ln) or b"{}")
            level = int(data.get("level", 0))
            write_json(root / "runtime/assistant.json", {"level": level})
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","level": level})

        if self.path == "/api/project/upload":
            ct = self.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
            if "multipart/form-data" not in ct:
                return self._json(400, {"status":"error","message":"multipart/form-data required"})
            boundary = ct.split("boundary=")[-1]
            raw = self.rfile.read(int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0)))
            parts = raw.split(b"--" + boundary.encode())
            filename, doc_type, file_content = None, "unknown", None
            for part in parts:
                if b"Content-Disposition" not in part: continue
                header, _, body = part.partition(b"\r\n\r\n")
                header_str = header.decode(errors="ignore")
                if 'name="file"' in header_str:
                    m = re.search(r'filename="([^"]+)"', header_str)
                    if m: filename = m.group(1)
                    file_content = body.rstrip(b"\r\n")
                elif 'name="doc_type"' in header_str:
                    doc_type = body.decode(errors="ignore").strip().replace("\r","").replace("\n","")
            if not filename or file_content is None:
                return self._json(400, {"status":"error","message":"no file detected"})
            dest = root / "uploads" / filename; dest.write_bytes(file_content)
            intake = read_json(root / "runtime/intake.json", {"files":[]})
            # dГ©dup par chemin
            seen = {f["path"] for f in intake.get("files", [])}
            if str(dest) not in seen:
                intake["files"].append({"name": filename, "path": str(dest), "type": doc_type, "size": len(file_content)})
                write_json(root / "runtime/intake.json", intake)
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","message":f"{filename} uploaded","doc_type":doc_type})

        if self.path == "/api/project/init":
            intake = read_json(root / "runtime/intake.json", {"files":[]})
            assistant = read_json(root / "runtime/assistant.json", {"level":0})
            autonomy = int(assistant.get("level", 0))

            # --- Plan MGA
            seq = [
                {"title":"ENGAGE вҶ’ BRIEF","call":{"op":"engage","target":{"type":"Scenario","name":"Website Bootstrap"},"params":{"mode":"brief","inputs":{"text":"","autonomy":autonomy}}}},
                {"title":"ENGAGE вҶ’ PLAN","call":{"op":"engage","target":{"type":"Scenario","name":"Website Bootstrap"},"params":{"mode":"plan","inputs":{"milestones":["MVP","review","render"],"autonomy":autonomy}}}},
                {"title":"CREATE вҶ’ GENERATE","call":{"op":"create","target":{"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},"params":{"phase":"generate","inputs":{"pages":["home","about","contact"],"nav":"top"},"options":{"return":"ref"}}}},
                {"title":"CREATE вҶ’ RENDER","call":{"op":"create","target":{"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},"params":{"phase":"render","options":{"return":"artifact"}}}},
                {"title":"READ вҶ’ VIEW","call":{"op":"read","target":{"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},"params":{"mode":"view","options":{"depth":1}}}}
            ]
            write_json(root / "run/kickoff_calls.json", {"sequence": seq, "from_uploads": intake.get("files",[]), "autonomy": autonomy})

            # --- ExГ©cution MGA
            results = []
            for item in seq:
                c = item["call"]
                results.append(meta_call(c["op"], c["target"], c.get("params"), None))
            write_json(root / "run/results.json", {"executed": results, "autonomy_echo": autonomy})

            # --- Pipeline objets
            pipe = run_pipeline(root)
            write_json(root / "run/last_init.json", {"ok": True, "autonomy": autonomy, "files": intake.get("files",[])})

            return self._json(200, {"status":"started","message":"MGA exГ©cutГ© + pipeline objets",
                                    "autonomy": autonomy,
                                    "run_files":["run/kickoff_calls.json","run/results.json","run/report.json","run/summary.md"],
                                    "pipeline": pipe})

        if self.path == "/api/tasks/next":
            return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","tasks":[]})

        self._json(404, {"status":"error","message":"Unknown endpoint"})

def serve():
    root = Path(__file__).parents[1]; ensure_dirs(root)
    httpd = HTTPServer(("", PORT), App)
    print(f"Project Intake server listening on http://localhost:{PORT}")
    print(f"Upload dir: {root / 'uploads'}")
    httpd.serve_forever()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    serve()
EOF

class Step:
    def run(self, params: dict):
        inputs = params.get("inputs") or {}
        text = (inputs.get("text") or "").strip()
        autonomy = int(inputs.get("autonomy", 0))

        if autonomy >= 1 and not text:
            # auto-brief minimal si full auto
            text = "Site vitrine minimal 3 pages (home/about/contact), navigation top, ton clair, responsive."

        if autonomy == 0 and not text:
            return {"needs":["brief_text"], "message":"Fournis un brief texte ou un document."}

        return {"brief_summary": text[:300]}

""" self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8") self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(html.encode("utf-8")) return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Not Found"}) def do_POST(self): ln = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0)) ct = self.headers.get("Content-Type", "") data = self.rfile.read(ln) if self.path == "/api/assistant/level": save_json(RUNTIME_DIR / "assistant.json", json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))) return self._json(200, {"status": "ok"}) if self.path == "/api/project/upload": env = {'REQUEST_METHOD': 'POST', 'CONTENT_TYPE': ct} form = cgi.FieldStorage(fp=io.BytesIO(data), headers=self.headers, environ=env) fi = form["file"] doc_type = form.getvalue("doc_type", "unknown") fn = Path(fi.filename).name dest = UPLOAD_DIR / fn with open(dest, "wb") as f: f.write(fi.file.read()) intake = load_json(RUNTIME_DIR / "intake.json", {"files": []}) intake["files"].append({ "name": fn, "path": str(dest), "type": doc_type, "size": dest.stat().st_size }) save_json(RUNTIME_DIR / "intake.json", intake) return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "saved": fn, "type": doc_type}) if self.path == "/api/project/init": rep = run_pipeline(ROOT) return self._json(200, rep) self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Unknown endpoint"}) def serve(): srv = HTTPServer(("", 8090), H) print("Project Intake server listening on http://localhost:8090") print(f"Upload dir: {UPLOAD_DIR}") srv.serve_forever() if __name__ == "__main__": serve() RedГ©marre ensuite : bashCopier le codepkill -f "project_intake_pack.http.server" || true python3 -m project_intake_pack.http.server Puis lance le pipeline (en full-auto si tu veux) : bashCopier le codecurl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/assistant/level \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"level":1}' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/project/init \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' VГ©rifie les sorties et ouvre le rendu : bashCopier le codeecho "---- TRACE ----"; J'espГЁre que pour toi c'est clair et que je t'embrouille pas trop parce que c'est quand mГӘme un projet trГЁs complexe. Le but c'est d'avoir le moins de codes possible, de tout centraliser dans des mГ©tamГ©thodes, des mГ©ta-objets, et aprГЁs le reste n'est plus que catalogue pour ajuster, affiner les principes de dГ©part. Mais on n'est pas censГ© avoir des catalogues trГЁs lourds. A ce propos, je me demandais si c'Г©tait utile de mettre la fractale complГЁte des objets dans le catalogue, ou si on ne lui indiquait que les Г©lГ©ments qu'on a. RГ©ellement, Г§a sert Г  rien de laisser une fractale vide. Et en l'occurrence, tout objet a par dГ©faut la fractale hГ©ritГ©e de MetaMetaclass, et on la nourrit avec les Г©lГ©ments du catalogue, et c'est pas la peine de faire des catalogues lourd avec des Г©lГ©ments vides.
qu'en penses-tu ?

Super clair. On fait simple et concret :

2) Fichier Object (resolveur + crГ©ation auto des catalogues/types + aliasage des relations)
Colle le fichier complet ci-dessous dans

pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/core/objects.py
# Resolveur d'objets + crГ©ation auto des catalogues <type>_catalog
# + hiГ©rarchie de types (<Type>Type -> ProductType -> Type)
# + injection mГ©tamГ©thodes via transversal_of / category_of / tag_of
# + aliasage de relations vers {inherits_from, depends_on, related_to, element_of}

from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone
import json
import uuid
from copy import deepcopy

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
REPO = ROOT / "repo"
REPO.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
REPO_FILE = REPO / "objects.json"

CATALOGS = ROOT / "catalogs"
CATALOGS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# ---------- Helpers

def now_iso() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00","Z")

def _load_repo() -> dict:
    if REPO_FILE.exists():
        return json.loads(REPO_FILE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {"objects": []}

def _save_repo(data: dict) -> None:
    REPO_FILE.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

def _index_by_id(objects: list[dict]) -> dict[str, dict]:
    idx = {}
    for o in objects:
        ident = o["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["id"]
        idx[ident] = o
    return idx

def _ensure_dir(p: Path) -> None:
    p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# ---------- Nommage canonique

def canonical_ident(object_type: str, name: str, version: str = "1_0_0") -> str:
    base = f"{object_type}_{name}".lower().replace(" ", "_")
    return f"object_{base}_v{version}"

def canonical_type_ident(type_name: str, version: str = "1_0_0") -> str:
    base = type_name.lower().replace(" ", "_")
    return f"type_{base}_v{version}"

# ---------- Relations canoniques et aliasage

CANON_RELS = {"inherits_from", "depends_on", "related_to", "element_of"}

# RГЁgle demandГ©e :
# - Toutes les relations associГ©es se transforment en alias de related_to ou depends_on
#   (on garde la sГ©mantique exacte via "rel_alias")
# - Exception : inherits devient child_of (cГҙtГ© nommage), mais stock canon = inherits_from
REL_ALIAS_MAP = {
    "inherits": "inherits_from",       # stockage canon
    "child_of": "inherits_from",       # synonyme d'IHM
    "depends_of": "depends_on",        # orthographe alternative
    "related": "related_to",
    "transversal_of": "related_to",    # injection transversale
    "category_of": "related_to",       # category est un cas de tag
    "tag_of": "related_to"
}

def normalize_rel_name(name: str) -> str:
    name = (name or "").strip().lower()
    if name in CANON_RELS:
        return name
    return REL_ALIAS_MAP.get(name, "related_to")

# ---------- HiГ©rarchie de types et catalogues

def _ensure_type_hierarchy(repo: dict, object_type: str) -> None:
    """
    CrГ©e si besoin :
      - Type            (racine)
      - ProductType     (hГ©rite de Type)
      - <ObjectType>Type (hГ©rite de ProductType)
    Chaque objet est **un objet** avec la fractale complГЁte.
    """
    objects = repo["objects"]
    idx = _index_by_id(objects)

    def has_id(ident: str) -> bool:
        return ident in idx

    def minimal_obj(ident: str, name_fr: str, otype: str, parent_ident: str | None) -> dict:
        obj = {
            "IDENTITY": {
                "DEFINITION": {
                    "id": ident,
                    "name": {"FR": name_fr},
                    "type": otype,
                    "description": {"FR": f"Type systГЁme {name_fr}"},
                    "question": {"FR": ""},
                    "example": {"FR": ""},
                    "created_by": "system",
                    "created_at": now_iso(),
                    "updated_by": "system",
                    "version": "1.0.0",
                    "updated_at": now_iso()
                },
                "RULE": {
                    "required": ["id","name","type","description","question","example"],
                    "automatic": ["created_by","created_at","updated_by","updated_at","version","template"],
                    "validators": [],
                    "lifecycle": { "name": "generic.object", "state": "defined" }
                },
                "OPTION": { "timestamps": { "created_at": None, "updated_at": None, "state_changed_at": None } }
            },
            "VIEW": {
                "DEFINITION": { "status": "draft", "labels": [] },
                "RULE": { "required": ["status"], "validators": [] },
                "OPTION": { "ui": {}, "formats": [] }
            },
            "CONTEXT": {
                "DEFINITION": { "relations": [], "tags": [] },
                "RULE": { "required": [], "validators": [] },
                "OPTION": { "scopes": [], "indices": [] }
            }
        }
        if parent_ident:
            # inherits_from (canon). UI pourra afficher "child_of"
            obj["CONTEXT"]["DEFINITION"]["relations"].append({
                "name": "inherits_from",
                "rel_alias": "child_of",
                "target": parent_ident
            })
        return obj

    type_Type_ident        = canonical_type_ident("Type")
    type_ProductType_ident = canonical_type_ident("ProductType")
    type_Specific_ident    = canonical_type_ident(f"{object_type.capitalize()}Type")

    changed = False

    if not has_id(type_Type_ident):
        objects.append(minimal_obj(type_Type_ident, "Type", "object_type_type", None))
        changed = True

    if not has_id(type_ProductType_ident):
        o = minimal_obj(type_ProductType_ident, "ProductType", "object_type_type", type_Type_ident)
        objects.append(o)
        changed = True

    if not has_id(type_Specific_ident):
        o = minimal_obj(type_Specific_ident, f"{object_type.capitalize()}Type", "object_type_type", type_ProductType_ident)
        # CГҙtГ© catalogue : <objecttype>_catalog
        _ensure_dir(CATALOGS / f"{object_type.lower()}_catalog")
        objects.append(o)
        changed = True

    if changed:
        _save_repo(repo)

def _ensure_catalog_directory(object_type: str) -> Path:
    p = CATALOGS / f"{object_type.lower()}_catalog"
    _ensure_dir(p)
    return p

# ---------- Injection mГ©tamГ©thodes (MetaMetaclass via transversal_of/category_of/tag_of)

def _collect_transversal_sources(repo: dict, obj: dict) -> list[dict]:
    """
    Cherche les relations {transversal_of, category_of, tag_of} (qui sont aliasГ©es en related_to)
    et retourne les objets sources Г  injecter.
    """
    idx = _index_by_id(repo["objects"])
    rels = obj["CONTEXT"]["DEFINITION"].get("relations", [])
    sources = []
    for r in rels:
        relname = normalize_rel_name(r.get("name"))
        if relname != "related_to":
            continue
        alias = (r.get("name") or "").lower()
        if alias not in ("transversal_of", "category_of", "tag_of"):
            continue
        tgt = r.get("target")
        if tgt in idx:
            sources.append(idx[tgt])
    return sources

def _deep_merge(a: dict, b: dict) -> dict:
    """merge b -> a (sans Г©craser les scalaires dГ©jГ  prГ©sents si b est vide)"""
    out = deepcopy(a)
    for k, v in b.items():
        if k not in out:
            out[k] = deepcopy(v)
        else:
            if isinstance(out[k], dict) and isinstance(v, dict):
                out[k] = _deep_merge(out[k], v)
            elif isinstance(out[k], list) and isinstance(v, list):
                # concat sans doublons simples
                out[k] = out[k] + [x for x in v if x not in out[k]]
            else:
                # on nвҖҷГ©crase pas si out a dГ©jГ  une valeur non vide
                if out[k] in (None, "", [], {}):
                    out[k] = deepcopy(v)
    return out

def _resolve_inheritance_chain(repo: dict, ident: str) -> list[dict]:
    """Remonte la chaГ®ne inherits_from (canon)."""
    idx = _index_by_id(repo["objects"])
    chain = []
    cur = idx.get(ident)
    visited = set()
    while cur and ident not in visited:
        visited.add(ident)
        chain.append(cur)
        # chercher parent
        rels = cur["CONTEXT"]["DEFINITION"].get("relations", [])
        parent = None
        for r in rels:
            if normalize_rel_name(r.get("name")) == "inherits_from":
                parent = r.get("target")
                break
        if parent and parent in idx:
            ident = parent
            cur = idx[parent]
            continue
        break
    chain.reverse()  # parent -> enfant
    return chain

def resolve_object(repo: dict, ident: str) -> dict:
    """
    RГ©sout lвҖҷobjet final:
      parent(Type) -> вҖҰ -> enfant
      + injection des sources transversales
    """
    idx = _index_by_id(repo["objects"])
    if ident not in idx:
        raise KeyError(f"Objet introuvable: {ident}")
    chain = _resolve_inheritance_chain(repo, ident)
    merged = {}
    for node in chain:
        merged = _deep_merge(merged, node)

    # injection transversale
    sources = _collect_transversal_sources(repo, merged)
    for src in sources:
        merged = _deep_merge(merged, src)

    return merged

# ---------- CrГ©ation dвҖҷobjet (respect metaschГ©ma + auto-catalogue + auto-types)

BASE_FRACTAL = {
    "IDENTITY": {
        "DEFINITION": {
            "id": "",
            "name": {"FR": ""},
            "type": "",
            "description": {"FR": ""},
            "question": {"FR": ""},
            "example": {"FR": ""},
            "created_by": "",
            "created_at": "",
            "updated_by": "",
            "version": "1.0.0",
            "updated_at": ""
        },
        "RULE": {
            "required": ["id","name","type","description","question","example"],
            "automatic": ["created_by","created_at","updated_by","updated_at","version","template"],
            "validators": [],
            "lifecycle": { "name": "generic.object", "state": "new" }
        },
        "OPTION": {
            "timestamps": { "created_at": None, "updated_at": None, "state_changed_at": None }
        }
    },
    "VIEW": {
        "DEFINITION": { "status": "draft", "labels": [] },
        "RULE": { "required": ["status"], "validators": [] },
        "OPTION": { "ui": {}, "formats": [] }
    },
    "CONTEXT": {
        "DEFINITION": { "relations": [], "tags": [] },
        "RULE": { "required": [], "validators": [] },
        "OPTION": { "scopes": [], "indices": [] }
    }
}

def _fill_identity(o: dict, created_by: str = "system") -> dict:
    o = deepcopy(o)
    idef = o["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]
    if not idef.get("id"):
        # si pas d'id fourni, on gГ©nГЁre un id canonique Г  partir du type+name si prГ©sents
        ot = idef.get("type","object")
        nm = idef.get("name",{}).get("FR","")
        if nm:
            idef["id"] = canonical_ident(ot, nm)
        else:
            idef["id"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
    if not idef.get("created_at"): idef["created_at"] = now_iso()
    idef["updated_at"] = now_iso()
    idef["created_by"] = idef.get("created_by") or created_by
    idef["updated_by"] = created_by
    return o

def _map_relations_alias(relations: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    out = []
    for r in relations or []:
        name = r.get("name")
        canon = normalize_rel_name(name)
        rr = deepcopy(r)
        rr["rel_alias"] = name
        rr["name"] = canon
        out.append(rr)
    return out

def create_object(payload: dict) -> dict:
    """
    payload minimal attendu:
    {
      "type": "Website",
      "name": "Aurora Studio",
      "description": "вҖҰ",
      "relations": [
        {"name":"inherits", "target":"type_website_type_v1_0_0"},
        {"name":"transversal_of","target":"metametaclass_v1_0_0"}
      ],
      "tags": ["website","bootstrap"]
    }
    - CrГ©e/complГЁte la fractale metaschГ©ma.
    - Assure les catalogues + hiГ©rarchie de types.
    - Normalise les relations (alias -> canon).
    - Enregistre dans repo/objects.json (upsert par id).
    """
    repo = _load_repo()
    object_type = payload.get("type","").strip()
    if not object_type:
        raise ValueError("payload.type requis")

    # Assure le catalogue <type>_catalog et la hiГ©rarchie de types
    _ensure_catalog_directory(object_type)
    _ensure_type_hierarchy(repo, object_type)

    # Fabrique lвҖҷobjet selon notre metaschГ©ma
    obj = deepcopy(BASE_FRACTAL)

    # IDENTITY
    obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["type"] = object_type
    name_fr = payload.get("name","").strip()
    obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["name"]["FR"] = name_fr
    obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["description"]["FR"] = payload.get("description","").strip()
    obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["question"]["FR"] = payload.get("question","")
    obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["example"]["FR"] = payload.get("example","")

    obj = _fill_identity(obj, created_by=payload.get("created_by","system"))

    # CONTEXT
    rels = payload.get("relations", [])
    obj["CONTEXT"]["DEFINITION"]["relations"] = _map_relations_alias(rels)
    obj["CONTEXT"]["DEFINITION"]["tags"] = list(dict.fromkeys(payload.get("tags", [])))

    # UPSERT
    data = _load_repo()
    objects = data["objects"]
    idx = _index_by_id(objects)
    oid = obj["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["id"]
    if oid in idx:
        # update "gentil" : remplace lвҖҷobjet complet
        for i, o in enumerate(objects):
            if o["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"]["id"] == oid:
                objects[i] = obj
                break
    else:
        objects.append(obj)

    _save_repo(data)
    return obj

# ---------- Utilitaires

def list_objects() -> list[dict]:
    return _load_repo().get("objects", [])

def get_object(ident: str) -> dict:
    repo = _load_repo()
    idx = _index_by_id(repo["objects"])
    return idx.get(ident)

def ensure_metametaclass() -> dict:
    """
    CrГ©e un objet MetaMetaclass minimal si absent
    (porteur des mГ©tamГ©thodes globales injectГ©es via transversal_of).
    """
    repo = _load_repo()
    ident = "metametaclass_v1_0_0"
    idx = _index_by_id(repo["objects"])
    if ident in idx:
        return idx[ident]
    base = deepcopy(BASE_FRACTAL)
    base["IDENTITY"]["DEFINITION"].update({
        "id": ident,
        "name": {"FR": "MetaMetaclass"},
        "type": "object_type_system",
        "description": {"FR":"Contient les mГ©tamГ©thodes globales Г  injecter"},
        "created_by":"system",
        "created_at": now_iso(),
        "updated_by":"system",
        "updated_at": now_iso()
    })
    # Exemple dвҖҷinjection (placeholders) dans VIEW/OPTION ou RULE/validators
    base["VIEW"]["OPTION"]["ui"] = {"meta_methods": ["CREATE","READ","UPDATE","DELETE","EXECUTE","ENGAGE"]}
    repo["objects"].append(base)
    _save_repo(repo)
    return base


3) Ce que fait ce fichier Object pour toi


CrГ©e automatiquement le dossier catalogue du type :


pour Website вҶ’ catalogs/website_catalog/




CrГ©e la hiГ©rarchie des types si nГ©cessaire :

Ce que tu as dГ©jГ

On ajoute un petit routeur qui :

A) project_intake_pack/http/api_router.py (NOUVEAU вҖ” complet)
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/http/api_router.py
from urllib.parse import parse_qs
import json, re

# вҶ“ Branche Г  ton moteur central (MGA / MetaMotor)
def _mga_execute(op: str, target: dict, params: dict) -> dict:
    """
    Adaptateur minimal : appelle ton MetaMotor central.
    Remplace ce stub par lвҖҷimport de ta vraie fonction MGA.
    Signature attendue (ex) : execute(op, target, params) -> dict
    """
    # --- STUB de dГ©mo (Г  remplacer par un vrai appel MGA) ---
    return {
        "status": "ok",
        "op": op,
        "target": target,
        "params": params,
        "outputs": {"echo": True}
    }

def _allowed(user_ctx: dict, object_type: str, method: str) -> bool:
    """
    Stub permissions : toujours True pour lвҖҷinstant.
    ГҖ remplacer par tes rГЁgles (roles/scopes/relations).
    """
    return True

def _parse_path_tail(tail: str) -> tuple[str, str, dict]:
    """
    Parse '<objecttype>_<method>_<params>' oГ№ <params> peut ГӘtre:
      - 'k=v,k2=v2'  (dans le segment)
      - ou fourni en querystring ?k=v&k2=v2
    Retourne (object_type, method, params_dict)
    """
    # on tolГЁre aussi 'objecttype_method' sans params
    parts = tail.split("_", 2)  # maxsplit=2 вҶ’ [obj, method, params?]
    if len(parts) == 1:
        raise ValueError("Chemin incomplet, attendu <objecttype>_<method>[_<params>]")
    if len(parts) == 2:
        object_type, method = parts[0], parts[1]
        inline_params = ""
    else:
        object_type, method, inline_params = parts

    params = {}
    inline_params = inline_params.strip()
    if inline_params:
        # format attendu: k=v,k2=v2 ; on accepte v JSON brut si prГ©sent
        for pair in inline_params.split(","):
            if not pair.strip():
                continue
            if "=" in pair:
                k, v = pair.split("=", 1)
                k = k.strip()
                v = v.strip()
                # tentative de JSON вҶ’ fallback string
                try:
                    params[k] = json.loads(v)
                except:
                    params[k] = v
            else:
                # flag bool simple: "dry_run" => True
                params[pair.strip()] = True
    return object_type, method, params

def route_api(path_tail: str, query: str, body: bytes | None, user_ctx: dict) -> tuple[int, dict]:
    """
    Routeur gГ©nГ©rique pour /api/<tail>
    Renvoie (http_status, json_body)
    """
    try:
        object_type, method, path_params = _parse_path_tail(path_tail)

        # Query string -> params additionnels
        q = parse_qs(query or "")
        query_params = {k: (v[0] if len(v)==1 else v) for k,v in q.items()}

        # Body JSON (si prГ©sent)
        body_params = {}
        if body:
            try:
                body_params = json.loads(body.decode("utf-8"))
            except:
                body_params = {}

        # Merge policy: body > query > path
        params = {**path_params, **query_params, **body_params}

        # Permissions
        if not _allowed(user_ctx, object_type, method):
            return 403, {"status":"forbidden","message":"Permission denied"}

        # Appel moteur central (agnostique)
        # CГҙtГ© вҖҳtargetвҖҷ, on reste minimal : {type: object_type} + hints
        target = {"type": object_type, "name": params.get("name", "")}
        res = _mga_execute(method, target, params)

        return 200, res

    except ValueError as e:
        return 400, {"status":"error","message": str(e)}
    except Exception as e:
        return 500, {"status":"error","message": repr(e)}

4) MГ©thodes globales & hГ©ritage


Les mГ©thodes globales (CREATE/READ/UPDATE/DELETE/EXECUTE/ENGAGE) vivent au niveau Type (ici APIType).


Les enfants (API_Internal, API_External) hГ©ritent via inherits. DГЁs que tu dГ©finis la вҖңGLOBALMETHODвҖқ dans APIType (dans tes catalogues ou via un patch), les deux en profitent automatiquement.


Pour les mГ©thodes secondaires propres (ex: SYNC, ROTATE_KEY), expose-les par relations related_to sur APIType ou sur chaque enfant si nГ©cessaire. Le routeur nвҖҷa pas besoin de mapper : il transmet method tel quel Г  ton MetaMotor (qui applique les rГЁgles du metaschГ©ma).



5) Permissions (Г  brancher)


Le stub _allowed() renvoie True. Branche-le sur :


le contexte user/session,


les scopes portГ©s par lвҖҷobjet Type (ex: APIType.VIEW.OPTION.ui.meta_methods),


ta matrice permission вҶ’ method.

2) Extraction du вҖңcontexte utilisateurвҖқ
project_intake_pack/http/auth.py вҖ” comment on dГ©termine le rГҙle. On lit lвҖҷen-tГӘte X-User-Role, sinon on tombe sur guest. Tu pourras brancher plus tard un vrai JWT/SSO sans toucher au routeur.
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/http/auth.py
from typing import Dict, Any

def get_user_ctx(headers) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Construit le contexte utilisateur Г  partir des en-tГӘtes.
    - X-User-Role: admin|editor|viewer|guest  (default: guest)
    - X-User-Id: ident fonctionnel (optionnel)
    """
    role = headers.get("X-User-Role", "guest").strip().lower()
    user_id = headers.get("X-User-Id", "")
    return {"role": role, "user_id": user_id or "anonymous"}

from typing import Literal

Family = Literal["engage", "create", "read", "update", "delete", "execute"]

_MAP = {
    # centrales
    "engage": "engage",
    "create": "create",
    "read": "read",
    "update": "update",
    "delete": "delete",
    "execute": "execute",

    # secondaires -> familles
    "brief": "engage",
    "plan": "engage",
    "assign": "engage",
    "coordinate": "engage",
    "notify": "engage",

    "ideate": "create",
    "generate": "create",
    "render": "create",
    "log": "create",

    "view": "read",
    "get": "read",
    "list": "read",
    "find": "read",
    "select": "read",
    "load": "read",
    "query": "read",
    "scan": "read",
    "audit": "read",

    "convert": "update",
    "optimize": "update",
    "correct": "update",

    "backup": "delete",
    "purge": "delete",
    "prune": "delete",

    "test": "execute",
    "route": "execute",
    "loop": "execute",
    "validate": "execute"
}

def method_family(method: str) -> Family:
    m = (method or "").strip().lower()
    return _MAP.get(m, "execute")  # par dГ©faut, le plus strict


4) Autorisations propres
project_intake_pack/http/permissions.py вҖ” charge la politique JSON, dГ©cide si on autorise {objet, mГ©thode} pour un rГҙle.
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/http/permissions.py
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Dict, Any

from project_intake_pack.http.method_families import method_family

_POLICY = None
_POLICY_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "policies" / "permissions.json"

def _load() -> Dict[str, Any]:
    global _POLICY
    if _POLICY is None:
        _POLICY = json.loads(_POLICY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return _POLICY

def allowed(user_ctx: Dict[str, Any], object_type: str, method: str) -> bool:
    pol = _load()
    role = (user_ctx.get("role") or "guest").lower()
    fam = method_family(method)

    # defaults
    defaults = pol.get("defaults", {}).get(role, {})
    decision = bool(defaults.get(fam, False))

    # overrides par type
    ovr_type = pol.get("overrides", {}).get(object_type, {})
    if role in ovr_type and fam in ovr_type[role]:
        decision = bool(ovr_type[role][fam])

    return decision


5) Routeur dвҖҷAPI gГ©nГ©rique (patch)
Remplace uniquement le contenu de project_intake_pack/http/api_router.py par ceci (on garde lвҖҷinterface du fichier que tu as dГ©jГ ) :
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/http/api_router.py
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from urllib.parse import parse_qs, unquote
from typing import Tuple, Dict, Any

from project_intake_pack.http.mga_adapter import mga
from project_intake_pack.http.permissions import allowed

def _parse_tail(tail: str) -> Tuple[str, str, Dict[str, Any]]:
    parts = tail.split("_", 2)
    if len(parts) < 2:
        raise ValueError("Chemin incomplet. Attendu: <objecttype>_<method>[_<params>]")
    object_type, method = parts[0], parts[1]
    inline = parts[2] if len(parts) == 3 else ""

    params_inline: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    if inline.strip():
        for pair in inline.split(","):
            pair = pair.strip()
            if not pair:
                continue
            if "=" in pair:
                k, v = pair.split("=", 1)
                k = k.strip()
                v = unquote(v.strip())
                try:
                    params_inline[k] = json.loads(v)
                except Exception:
                    params_inline[k] = v
            else:
                params_inline[pair] = True

    return object_type, method, params_inline

def route_api(path_tail: str, query: str, body: bytes | None, user_ctx: dict) -> Tuple[int, Dict[str, Any]]:
    try:
        object_type, method, params_inline = _parse_tail(path_tail)

        # Query
        q = parse_qs(query or "")
        params_query = {k: (v[0] if len(v) == 1 else v) for k, v in q.items()}

        # Body JSON
        params_body: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        if body:
            try:
                params_body = json.loads(body.decode("utf-8"))
            except Exception:
                params_body = {}

        # Merge (inline < query < body)
        params: Dict[str, Any] = {**params_inline, **params_query, **params_body}

        # Permissions
        if not allowed(user_ctx, object_type, method):
            return 403, {"status": "forbidden", "message": f"role '{user_ctx.get('role')}' not allowed for {object_type}.{method}"}

        # Call MGA
        target = {"type": object_type, "name": params.get("name", "")}
        res = mga.execute(method, target, params)
        return 200, res

    except ValueError as e:
        return 400, {"status": "error", "message": str(e)}
    except Exception as e:
        return 500, {"status": "error", "message": repr(e)}

рҹҺҜ Objectif
Remplacer le вҖңMGA mockвҖқ actuel par ton MGA dГ©finitif, de faГ§on configurable :


Option A (HTTP) : ton MGA Г©coute ailleurs (ex: http://localhost:8787/meta_call).


Option B (Python in-process) : ton MGA est un module Python (my_mga) quвҖҷon importe et appelle.


Tu peux activer lвҖҷun ou lвҖҷautre via un simple fichier de config ou des variables dвҖҷenvironnement.

2) Adapter MGA (remplace complГЁtement lвҖҷactuel)
Chemin : project_intake_pack/core/mga_adapter.py
pythonCopier le codeimport os, json, importlib, urllib.request, urllib.error

def _load_config(root):
    p = root / "project_intake_pack" / "config" / "mga.json"
    if p.exists():
        return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {
        "mode": os.environ.get("MGA_MODE", "http"),
        "http": {
            "url": os.environ.get("MGA_HTTP_URL", "http://localhost:8787/meta_call"),
            "timeout_sec": 60
        },
        "python": {
            "module": os.environ.get("MGA_PYTHON_MODULE", "my_mga"),
            "callable": os.environ.get("MGA_PYTHON_CALLABLE", "meta_call")
        }
    }

def _http_meta_call(url, payload, timeout):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"})
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as resp:
            return json.loads(resp.read().decode("utf-8"))
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode("utf-8")
        return {"status": "error", "error": f"HTTP {e.code}", "body": body}
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": "error", "error": str(e)}

def _python_meta_call(module_name, func_name, payload):
    try:
        mod = importlib.import_module(module_name)
        fn = getattr(mod, func_name)
        return fn(payload)
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": "error", "error": str(e)}

def meta_call(root, op, target, params=None, context=None):
    """
    Appel unique vers MGA (dГ©finitif). 
    - op: "create" | "read" | "update" | "delete" | "execute" | "engage"
    - target: { "type": "<ObjectType>", "name": "<Name>" } (ou ident si tu prГ©fГЁres)
    - params/context: dict
    Retourne la rГ©ponse brute du MGA.
    """
    cfg = _load_config(root)
    payload = {
        "op": op,
        "target": target,
        "params": params or {},
        "context": context or {}
    }

    if cfg["mode"] == "http":
        return _http_meta_call(cfg["http"]["url"], payload, cfg["http"]["timeout_sec"])
    elif cfg["mode"] == "python":
        return _python_meta_call(cfg["python"]["module"], cfg["python"]["callable"], payload)
    else:
        return {"status": "error", "error": f"Invalid MGA mode '{cfg['mode']}'"}

def _ts():

def run_pipeline(root_path):

    # 2) ENGAGE вҶ’ PLAN

    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"engage вҶ’ Scenario Website Bootstrap","op":"engage","status":r2.get("status","ok"),"details":r2})

    # 3) CREATE вҶ’ GENERATE
    r3 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="create",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"phase":"generate","inputs":{"pages":["home","about","contact"],"nav":"top"},"options":{"return":"ref"}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"create вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"create","status":r3.get("status","ok"),"details":r3})

    # 4) CREATE вҶ’ RENDER

        root=root,
        op="create",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"phase":"render","options":{"return":"artifact"}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"create вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"create","status":r4.get("status","ok"),"details":r4})

    # 5) READ вҶ’ VIEW
    r5 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="read",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"mode":"view","options":{"depth":1}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"read вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"read","status":r5.get("status","ok"),"details":r5})

    _write_json(run_dir / "trace.json", trace)
    _write_json(run_dir / "results.json", {"executed":[r1,r2,r3,r4,r5]})

    # petit rapport simplifiГ©
    report = {
        "created": [],
        "updated": [],
        "skipped": [],
        "notes": []
    }
    _write_json(run_dir / "report.json", report)

    # summary.md

    for ev in trace["events"]:
        lines.append(f"- {ev['ts']} | {ev['title']} [{ev['op']}] вҖ” {ev['status']}")
    (run_dir / "summary.md").write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")

    return report

8) Pourquoi on voyait des ENGAGE/CREATE en double ?
Parce quвҖҷon appelait un mock MGA Г  plusieurs endroits (UI + pipeline),
ou que la page dГ©clenchait automatiquement des appels.
En branchant toute exГ©cution via mga_adapter.meta_call et en lanГ§ant seulement via /api/project/init, on Г©limine ces doublons.

En bref


Tu as maintenant un point unique pour parler Г  ton MGA.


Tu peux choisir HTTP (micro-service externe) ou Python (in-process).


Le pipeline envoie les steps/scГ©nario Г  MGA вҶ’ MGA exГ©cute et renvoie.


La preview est exposГ©e automatiquement.


Le tout reste rГ©cursif/loop-ready si tu fais renvoyer next_actions par MGA.


Si tu veux, je peux te fournir un mini MGA вҖңexterne HTTPвҖқ dвҖҷexemple (un simple Flask ou BaseHTTPRequestHandler) qui renvoie le bon format вҖ” utile pour tester le mode HTTP avant de brancher ton vrai moteur.

from pathlib import Path
import json, time
from .mga_adapter import meta_call

def _ts():
    return time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", time.gmtime())

def _write_json(p: Path, obj):
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

def run_pipeline(root_path: str):
    """
    Point dвҖҷentrГ©e pipeline : exГ©cute le scГ©nario 'Website Bootstrap'
    en sГ©quence via MGA (engage вҶ’ engage вҶ’ create вҶ’ create вҶ’ read).
    """
    root = Path(root_path)
    run_dir = root / "project_intake_pack" / "run"
    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    trace = {"events": []}
    executed = []

    # 1) ENGAGE вҶ’ BRIEF
    r1 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="engage",
        target={"type":"Scenario","name":"Website Bootstrap"},
        params={"mode":"brief","inputs":{"text":"","autonomy": 1}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"engage вҶ’ Scenario Website Bootstrap","op":"engage","status":r1.get("status","ok"),"details":r1})
    executed.append(r1)

    # 2) ENGAGE вҶ’ PLAN
    r2 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="engage",
        target={"type":"Scenario","name":"Website Bootstrap"},
        params={"mode":"plan","inputs":{"milestones":["MVP","review","render"],"autonomy": 1}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"engage вҶ’ Scenario Website Bootstrap","op":"engage","status":r2.get("status","ok"),"details":r2})
    executed.append(r2)

    # 3) CREATE вҶ’ GENERATE
    r3 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="create",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"phase":"generate","inputs":{"pages":["home","about","contact"],"nav":"top"},"options":{"return":"ref"}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"create вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"create","status":r3.get("status","ok"),"details":r3})
    executed.append(r3)

    # 4) CREATE вҶ’ RENDER
    r4 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="create",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"phase":"render","options":{"return":"artifact"}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"create вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"create","status":r4.get("status","ok"),"details":r4})
    executed.append(r4)

    # 5) READ вҶ’ VIEW
    r5 = meta_call(
        root=root,
        op="read",
        target={"type":"Website","name":"Aurora Studio"},
        params={"mode":"view","options":{"depth":1}},
        context={"source":"intake"}
    )
    trace["events"].append({"ts":_ts(),"title":"read вҶ’ Website Aurora Studio","op":"read","status":r5.get("status","ok"),"details":r5})
    executed.append(r5)

    # Persist
    _write_json(run_dir / "trace.json", trace)
    _write_json(run_dir / "results.json", {"executed": executed})

    # rapport simple
    report = {
        "created": [],
        "updated": [],
        "skipped": [],
        "notes": []
    }
    _write_json(run_dir / "report.json", report)

    # summary.md
    lines = ["# ExГ©cution du scГ©nario Website Bootstrap"]
    for ev in trace["events"]:
        lines.append(f"- {ev['ts']} | {ev['title']} [{ev['op']}] вҖ” {ev['status']}")
    (run_dir / "summary.md").write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")

    return {"status":"ok","report": report}

pythonCopier le codeimport os, json, importlib, urllib.request, urllib.error

def _load_config(root):

def _http_meta_call(url, payload, timeout):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"})
    try:

    except Exception as e:

def _python_meta_call(module_name, func_name, payload):
    try:

        fn = getattr(mod, func_name)
        return fn(payload)
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": "error", "error": str(e)}

def meta_call(root, op, target, params=None, context=None):
    cfg = _load_config(root)
    payload = {
        "op": op,
        "target": target,
        "params": params or {},
        "context": context or {}
    }
    if cfg["mode"] == "http":
        return _http_meta_call(cfg["http"]["url"], payload, cfg["http"]["timeout_sec"])
    elif cfg["mode"] == "python":

    else:

1) project_intake_pack/config/mga.json
Fichier de configuration dГ©clarative (peut ГӘtre surchargГ© par la config runtime et les variables dвҖҷenvironnement).

Si ton MGA tourne localement sur le port 9000 : laisse http://localhost:9000.

Le token est lu dans la variable dвҖҷenvironnement MGA_TOKEN.



2) project_intake_pack/core/system_config.py
Petit utilitaire centralisГ© pour lire/Г©crire la config runtime (que le bootstrap va renseigner), et rГ©soudre les surcharges (runtime вҶ’ config/вҖҰ вҶ’ env).
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/core/system_config.py
from __future__ import annotations
import json, os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
RUNTIME_DIR = ROOT / "runtime"
RUNTIME_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
SYSTEM_JSON = RUNTIME_DIR / "system.json"

class SystemConfig:
    """
    Lecture/Г©criture de la config runtime dans project_intake_pack/runtime/system.json
    Fusion simple: runtime > config statique > env (pour secrets)
    """
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.root = ROOT

    def read_runtime(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        if SYSTEM_JSON.exists():
            return json.loads(SYSTEM_JSON.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        return {}

    def write_runtime(self, payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        current = self.read_runtime()
        current.update(payload)
        SYSTEM_JSON.write_text(json.dumps(current, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

    def read_static(self, relpath: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        p = self.root / relpath
        if p.exists():
            return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        return {}

    def get_mga(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        # 1) runtime
        runtime = self.read_runtime()
        mga_rt = runtime.get("mga", {})

        # 2) static fallback
        mga_static = self.read_static("config/mga.json")

        # base merge (runtime > static)
        cfg = dict(mga_static)
        cfg.update(mga_rt)

        # 3) env overrides
        # MGA_BASE_URL, MGA_ENDPOINT, MGA_TOKEN
        if os.environ.get("MGA_BASE_URL"):
            cfg["base_url"] = os.environ["MGA_BASE_URL"]
        if os.environ.get("MGA_ENDPOINT"):
            cfg["endpoint"] = os.environ["MGA_ENDPOINT"]
        if "auth" not in cfg:
            cfg["auth"] = {"type": "bearer", "token_env": "MGA_TOKEN"}
        token_env = cfg.get("auth", {}).get("token_env", "MGA_TOKEN")
        token_val = os.environ.get(token_env)
        if token_val:
            cfg["auth"]["token"] = token_val  # conservГ© en mГ©moire uniquement

        # defaults
        cfg.setdefault("mode", "remote")
        cfg.setdefault("endpoint", "/meta-call")
        cfg.setdefault("timeouts", {"connect": 5, "read": 60})
        cfg.setdefault("retries", 2)
        cfg.setdefault("dry_run", False)
        cfg.setdefault("log_requests", True)
        cfg.setdefault("log_responses", True)

        return cfg


3) project_intake_pack/core/mga_adapter.py
Adaptateur unique : le pipeline appelle meta_call(...) вҶ’ lвҖҷadaptateur lit la config (runtime/env), et appelle ton MGA rГ©el via HTTP (ou le mock local si mode: local).
pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/core/mga_adapter.py
from __future__ import annotations
import json, time
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.error import URLError, HTTPError

from .system_config import SystemConfig
from .mga import run_mga_local  # mock local dГ©jГ  prГ©sent dans le repo (fallback)

def _http_post_json(url: str, payload: Dict[str, Any], headers: Dict[str, str]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
    req = Request(url, data=data, headers=headers, method="POST")
    try:
        with urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
            body = resp.read().decode("utf-8")
            return json.loads(body) if body else {}
    except HTTPError as e:
        raise RuntimeError(f"MGA HTTP {e.code}: {e.read().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')}")
    except URLError as e:
        raise RuntimeError(f"MGA network error: {e}")

def meta_call(op: str,
              target: Dict[str, Any],
              params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
              autonomy: Optional[int] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Appel unifiГ© MGA :
    - mode=remote : POST {base_url}{endpoint} avec Bearer token
    - mode=local  : run_mga_local (mock)
    """
    cfg = SystemConfig().get_mga()
    mode = cfg.get("mode", "remote")

    payload = {
        "op": op,
        "target": target,
        "params": params or {},
        "autonomy": autonomy
    }

    if cfg.get("dry_run"):
        return {
            "status": "ok",
            "dry_run": True,
            "echo": payload,
            "ts": int(time.time())
        }

    if mode == "local":
        # Fallback mock вҖ” utile tant que ton vrai MGA nвҖҷest pas up
        return run_mga_local(payload)

    # remote
    base = cfg["base_url"].rstrip("/")
    endpoint = cfg.get("endpoint", "/meta-call")
    url = f"{base}{endpoint}"

    headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json"
    }
    auth = cfg.get("auth", {})
    if auth.get("type") == "bearer":
        token = auth.get("token")  # dГ©jГ  injectГ© depuis env par SystemConfig
        if token:
            headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"

    if cfg.get("log_requests"):
        print(f"[MGA] POST {url} :: {json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False)[:500]}")

    resp = _http_post_json(url, payload, headers)

    if cfg.get("log_responses"):
        print(f"[MGA] RESP :: {json.dumps(resp, ensure_ascii=False)[:500]}")

    return resp


Tant que ton vrai MGA nвҖҷest pas lancГ©, tu peux mettre "mode": "local" dans config/mga.json pour rester sur le mock. DГЁs que ton service tourne (sur http://localhost:9000 par ex.) et quвҖҷil expose /meta-call, remets "mode": "remote".


4) (Optionnel mais pratique) project_intake_pack/http/server.py вҖ” endpoints de config MGA
Si tu veux rГ©gler MGA depuis lвҖҷUI (bootstrap/config), ajoute ces routes.
(Si ton server.py actuel est diffГ©rent, remplace juste/ajoute ces blocs вҖ” le reste de ton serveur peut rester identique.)
pythonCopier le code# Extraits Г  intГ©grer dans project_intake_pack/http/server.py

from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
from pathlib import Path
import json, io, time

from project_intake_pack.core.system_config import SystemConfig

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
UPLOADS = ROOT / "uploads"
UPLOADS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def _json(handler: BaseHTTPRequestHandler, code: int, obj: dict):
    handler.send_response(code)
    handler.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
    handler.end_headers()
    handler.wfile.write(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8"))

class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        if self.path == "/api/config/mga":
            cfg = SystemConfig().get_mga()
            return _json(self, 200, {"status":"ok","mga":cfg})

        if self.path == "/":
            # Servez votre UI (bootstrap/install) вҖ” ici simplifiГ©
            html = (ROOT / "public/index.html")
            if html.exists():
                data = html.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return
            return _json(self, 200, {"status":"ready"})

        self.send_response(404); self.end_headers()

    def do_POST(self):
        ln = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", "0"))
        raw = self.rfile.read(ln) if ln else b"{}"
        try:
            body = json.loads(raw.decode("utf-8"))
        except:
            body = {}

        # UI/Bootstrap poste la config MGA ici
        if self.path == "/api/config/mga":
            # body attendu: {"base_url":"...", "endpoint":"/meta-call", "mode":"remote", "auth":{"type":"bearer","token_env":"MGA_TOKEN"}}
            sc = SystemConfig()
            sc.write_runtime({"mga": body})
            return _json(self, 200, {"status":"ok","saved": body})

        self.send_response(404); self.end_headers()

def main():
    httpd = HTTPServer(("", 8090), Handler)
    print("Project Intake server listening on http://localhost:8090")
    print(f"Upload dir: {UPLOADS}")
    httpd.serve_forever()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


ГҮa te permet dвҖҷenregistrer lвҖҷURL et le token MGA depuis le bootstrap (un simple POST JSON sur /api/config/mga). Le pipeline lira ensuite toujours la conf via SystemConfig().get_mga().

# ...

6) LвҖҷordre вҖңbootstrap вҶ’ config вҶ’ projetвҖқ
Tu lвҖҷas parfaitement rГ©sumГ©. ConcrГЁtement :


Lancer le serveur (UI bootstrap)


bashCopier le codeexport MGA_TOKEN="ton_token_secret"
python3 -m project_intake_pack.http.server



Dans lвҖҷUI, saisir :


DB / Admin / AI (ton bootstrap le fait dГ©jГ )


MGA (formulaire qui POST sur /api/config/mga avec base_url, endpoint, mode, etc.)




CrГ©er le projet Agence (si premiГЁre fois) ou un projet (si une Agence existe)


DГЁs que MGA est configurГ©, les appels du pipeline passent via mga_adapter et tapent ton vrai MGA.
Si tu nвҖҷas pas encore ton service MGA up, mets mode: "local" dans config/mga.json вҖ” Г§a restera sur le mock local jusquвҖҷГ  ce que tu switches.



Commandes de vГ©rification


Voir la conf MGA effective :


bashCopier le codecurl -s http://localhost:8090/api/config/mga | jq .



Forcer la conf MGA par POST (depuis un script ou lвҖҷUI bootstrap) :


bashCopier le codecurl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/config/mga \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"mode":"remote","base_url":"http://localhost:9000","endpoint":"/meta-call","auth":{"type":"bearer","token_env":"MGA_TOKEN"}}' | jq .



ExГ©cuter ensuite ton init de projet (comme tu le fais dГ©jГ ) :


bashCopier le codecurl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/project/init \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' | jq .


En bref


Tu mets http://localhost:9000 si ton MGA tourne localement.


Tu exportes MGA_TOKEN pour lвҖҷauth Bearer.


Tu enregistres cette config via le bootstrap (POST /api/config/mga) вҖ” ou tu la laisses dans config/mga.json + env.


Le pipeline appelle toujours mga_adapter.meta_call, qui lit la conf dynamique et tape ton MGA rГ©el.

вқҢ Erreur: /api/project/init -> 500 Object of type PosixPath is not JSON serializable
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error)

Bien vu : lвҖҷerreur vient du fait que le pipeline te renvoie des objets Path (PosixPath) quelque part dans la rГ©ponse, et notre sГ©rialisation JSON par dГ©faut ne sait pas les encoder.
Tu nвҖҷas pas besoin de toucher au pipeline : corrige juste la sГ©rialisation cГҙtГ© serveur pour convertir automatiquement tout ce qui nвҖҷest pas sГ©rialisable (ex. Path, datetime, set, etc.).
Correctif minimal (remplace uniquement la fonction _json dans project_intake_pack/http/server.py)
pythonCopier le codedef _json_default(o):
    from pathlib import Path
    import datetime
    # Path вҶ’ string
    if isinstance(o, Path):
        return str(o)
    # datetime/date вҶ’ ISO 8601
    if isinstance(o, (datetime.datetime, datetime.date)):
        return o.isoformat()
    # set вҶ’ list
    if isinstance(o, set):
        return list(o)
    # objets quelconques вҶ’ string fallback
    return str(o)

def _json(handler: BaseHTTPRequestHandler, code: int, payload: dict):
    data = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=None, default=_json_default).encode("utf-8")
    handler.send_response(code)
    handler.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
    handler.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
    handler.end_headers()
    handler.wfile.write(data)

CвҖҷest tout. RedГ©marre ensuite :

python3 -m project_intake_pack.http.server

Voici exactement ce que tu ajoutes et comment tu lвҖҷutilises. 1) Nouveau module вҖңpost-installвҖқ (appelable par le bootstrap ou Г  la demande) Fichier Г  crГ©er : project_intake_pack/bootstrap/post_install.py pythonCopier le code# project_intake_pack/bootstrap/post_install.py from __future__ import annotations import argparse, json, os, shutil, subprocess, sys from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime, timezone ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] # .../FULLAUTO PKG = ROOT / "project_intake_pack" def _now(): return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") def _ensure_dirs(): (PKG / "config").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "catalogs").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "catalogs" / "objects").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "public").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "repo").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "run").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "runtime").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (PKG / "uploads").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) def _write_json(p: Path, data: dict): p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) with p.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) def _load_json(p: Path, default: dict|list): if p.exists(): try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) except Exception: return default return default def _seed_document_types(): # si dГ©jГ  prГ©sent, on ne touche pas cfg_path = PKG / "config" / "document_types.json" if cfg_path.exists(): return data = { "types": [ { "id": "brief", "label": "Brief" }, { "id": "cahier_des_charges", "label": "Cahier des charges" }, { "id": "notes", "label": "Notes libres" }, { "id": "idee", "label": "IdГ©e gГ©nГ©rale" } ], "assistance_levels": [ { "level": 0, "label": "AssistГ© (pose des questions, crГ©e des tГўches si besoin)" }, { "level": 1, "label": "Full auto" } ], "defaults": { "assistance_level": 0 } } _write_json(cfg_path, data) def _seed_assistant(): # si dГ©jГ  prГ©sent, ne pas Г©craser cfg_path = PKG / "config" / "assistant.json" if cfg_path.exists(): return data = { "level": 0, "updated_at": _now() } _write_json(cfg_path, data) def _seed_mga_config(project_name: str|None, base_url: str|None, token: str|None): cfg_path = PKG / "config" / "mga.json" current = _load_json(cfg_path, {}) # on ne force pas, on complГЁte proprement current.setdefault("project", {}) if project_name: current["project"]["name"] = project_name # Les 2 clГ©s ci-dessous sont OPTIONNELLES вҖ” si tu nвҖҷas pas encore de MGA rГ©el, # laisse "adapter" sur "mock" et ne mets pas dвҖҷURL/token. current.setdefault("adapter", current.get("adapter", "mock")) # "mock" ou "http" if base_url: current["base_url"] = base_url # ex: "http://localhost:9000" if token: current["token"] = token # ex: os.environ["MGA_TOKEN"] _write_json(cfg_path, current) def _seed_index_ui(): ui = PKG / "public" / "index.html" # on ne rГ©Г©crit pas si tu lвҖҷas dГ©jГ  customisГ© if ui.exists(): return html = """ Intake | Upload & Lancement

Project Intake

""" ui.write_text(html, encoding="utf-8") def run_post_install(project_name: str|None, auto_start: bool, open_browser: bool, mga_base_url: str|None, mga_token: str|None): _ensure_dirs() _seed_document_types() _seed_assistant() _seed_mga_config(project_name, mga_base_url, mga_token) _seed_index_ui() # petit вҖңREADMEвҖқ dвҖҷГ©tat state = { "status": "ready", "project": project_name or "", "updated_at": _now() } _write_json(PKG / "runtime" / "intake_state.json", state) if auto_start: # lance le serveur en sous-processus env = os.environ.copy() cmd = [sys.executable, "-m", "project_intake_pack.http.server"] p = subprocess.Popen(cmd, cwd=str(ROOT), env=env) print(f"Intake server started (pid={p.pid}) on http://localhost:8090") if open_browser: try: import webbrowser webbrowser.open_new_tab("http://localhost:8090/") except Exception: pass def main(): ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Post-install Intake Pack") ap.add_argument("--project", default="", help="Nom du projet (affecte config/mga.json)") ap.add_argument("--start", action="store_true", help="DГ©marrer le mini-serveur intake") ap.add_argument("--no-browser", action="store_true", help="Ne pas ouvrir le navigateur") ap.add_argument("--mga-base-url", default="", help="URL du MGA (laisser vide pour mock)") ap.add_argument("--mga-token", default="", help="Token MGA (optionnel)") args = ap.parse_args() run_post_install( project_name=args.project or None, auto_start=args.start, open_browser=(not args.no_browser), mga_base_url=(args.mga_base_url or None), mga_token=(args.mga_token or None), ) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 2) Ton bootstrap lвҖҷappelle en fin dвҖҷinstallation Dans TON script bootstrap (celui qui crГ©e admin/BDD/etc.), ajoute Г  la toute fin : pythonCopier le code# вҖҰ aprГЁs avoir Г©crit la config systГЁme/bdd/ia/admin вҖҰ import subprocess, sys, os from pathlib import Path ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] # adapte si besoin # Exemple : on passe le nom du projet, on dГ©marre le serveur et on ouvre le navigateur subprocess.check_call([ sys.executable, "-m", "project_intake_pack.bootstrap.post_install", "--project", "Agence", # ou le nom saisi dans ton UI bootstrap "--start" ], cwd=str(ROOT)) Tu peux aussi ne pas dГ©marrer automatiquement (retire --start) si tu prГ©fГЁres garder le lancement manuel. 3) Lancement manuel (au cas par cas pour dвҖҷautres projets) Tu peux exГ©cuter lвҖҷintake pack sans refaire un bootstrap complet, pour nвҖҷimporte quel projet : bashCopier le codecd /Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/__EURKAI/FULLAUTO # puis : http://localhost:8090/ Si tu as un MGA rГ©el : bashCopier le codepython3 -m project_intake_pack.bootstrap.post_install \ --project "Mon Projet" \ --mga-base-url "http://localhost:9000" \ --mga-token "$MGA_TOKEN" \ --start Tant que tu nвҖҷas pas de MGA rГ©el, laisse adapter: "mock" dans project_intake_pack/config/mga.json (le fichier est crГ©Г©/complГ©tГ© par le post-install). 4) Ce que Г§a fait exactement CrГ©e/complГЁte tous les dossiers (config/, catalogs/, public/, runtime/, uploads/вҖҰ).
