Voici bootstrap.py complet, prГӘt Г  coller Г  la racine de ton dГ©pГҙt (FULLAUTO/bootstrap.py). Il configure le projet, lвҖҷhГ©bergeur (BDD), lвҖҷadmin, dГ©finit le MGA (mock ou http avec base_url + token), initialise les fichiers de config de lвҖҷintake, puis (optionnel) dГ©marre le mini-serveur dвҖҷupload/scГ©nario. Utilisation rapide : bashCopier le codecd /Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/__EURKAI/FULLAUTO python3 bootstrap.py --project "Agence" \ --db-type sqlite --db-file project_intake_pack/db/agence.db \ --admin-email admin@agence.test --admin-login admin --admin-password admin \ --mga-adapter mock \ --assist 0 \ --start Puis ouvre http://localhost:8090/. pythonCopier le code#!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ Bootstrap principal - CrГ©e la config systГЁme (projet, admin, BDD, IA providers) - DГ©finit la config MGA (mock ou http + base_url + token) - PrГ©pare les fichiers de l'intake (document_types, assistant, mga.json, UI) - (optionnel) DГ©marre le mini-serveur intake et ouvre le navigateur Fichier Г  placer Г  la racine du repo: FULLAUTO/bootstrap.py """ from __future__ import annotations import argparse, json, os, sys, subprocess from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime, timezone # Racine repo (FULLAUTO) et package intake ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent PKG = ROOT / "project_intake_pack" # ----------------------------- # Utils # ----------------------------- def now_iso(): return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") def write_json(path: Path, data: dict | list): path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) with path.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) def read_json(path: Path, default: dict | list): if path.exists(): try: return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) except Exception: return default return default def ensure_base_dirs(): for p in [ PKG / "config", PKG / "catalogs", PKG / "catalogs" / "objects", PKG / "public", PKG / "repo", PKG / "run", PKG / "runtime", PKG / "uploads", ]: p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) # ----------------------------- # Seeds intake (doc types, assistant) # ----------------------------- def seed_document_types_if_missing(): cfg = PKG / "config" / "document_types.json" if cfg.exists(): return data = { "types": [ {"id": "brief", "label": "Brief"}, {"id": "cahier_des_charges", "label": "Cahier des charges"}, {"id": "notes", "label": "Notes libres"}, {"id": "idee", "label": "IdГ©e gГ©nГ©rale"} ], "assistance_levels": [ {"level": 0, "label": "AssistГ© (pose des questions, crГ©e des tГўches si besoin)"}, {"level": 1, "label": "Full auto"} ], "defaults": {"assistance_level": 0} } write_json(cfg, data) def set_assistant_level(level: int): cfg = PKG / "config" / "assistant.json" write_json(cfg, {"level": int(level), "updated_at": now_iso()}) # ----------------------------- # MGA config # ----------------------------- def set_mga_config(adapter: str, base_url: str | None, token: str | None, project_name: str | None): """ adapter: "mock" (pas de MGA rГ©el) ou "http" base_url/token nГ©cessaires si adapter="http" """ cfg_path = PKG / "config" / "mga.json" cfg = read_json(cfg_path, {}) cfg["adapter"] = adapter # "mock" | "http" if project_name: cfg.setdefault("project", {}) cfg["project"]["name"] = project_name if adapter == "http": if not base_url: raise ValueError("Avec --mga-adapter http tu dois fournir --mga-base-url") cfg["base_url"] = base_url if token: cfg["token"] = token write_json(cfg_path, cfg) # ----------------------------- # System config (projet, admin, BDD, providers IA) # ----------------------------- def set_system_config(project_name: str, admin_email: str, admin_login: str, admin_password: str, db_type: str, db_file: str | None, db_host: str | None, db_port: int | None, db_user: str | None, db_password: str | None, ai_providers: list[dict] | None): """ Гүcrit une config systГЁme compacte, consommable plus tard """ cfg_path = PKG / "config" / "system.json" db_entry = {"type": db_type, "is_default": True, "active": True, "params": {}} if db_type == "sqlite": # valeur par dГ©faut sГ»re db_file = db_file or str(PKG / "db" / f"{project_name.lower().replace(' ','_')}.db") Path(db_file).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) db_entry["params"]["file"] = db_file db_entry["params"]["name"] = project_name.lower().replace(" ", "_") dsn = f"sqlite:///{db_file}" elif db_type in ("mongodb", "postgres"): if not db_host or not db_port or not db_user: raise ValueError(f"Pour {db_type}, fournis --db-host --db-port --db-user (et --db-password si besoin)") db_entry["params"]["host"] = db_host db_entry["params"]["port"] = int(db_port) db_entry["params"]["user"] = db_user if db_password: db_entry["params"]["password"] = db_password if db_type == "mongodb": dsn = f"mongodb://{db_user}:{db_password or ''}@{db_host}:{db_port}" else: dsn = f"postgresql://{db_user}:{db_password or ''}@{db_host}:{db_port}/postgres" else: raise ValueError("db_type supportГ©s: sqlite | mongodb | postgres") syscfg = { "project": {"name": project_name, "created_at": now_iso()}, "admin": {"email": admin_email, "login": admin_login, "password": admin_password}, "databases": [db_entry], "ai_providers": ai_providers or [], "dsn_preview": dsn } write_json(cfg_path, syscfg) # ----------------------------- # UI minimal (si rien nвҖҷexiste) # ----------------------------- def ensure_minimal_index(): index = PKG / "public" / "index.html" if index.exists(): return html = """ Bootstrap terminГ©

Bootstrap terminГ©

Lance ensuite lвҖҷintake ou laisse le bootstrap dГ©marrer le serveur automatiquement si tu as passГ© --start.

PrГ©visualisation (sera disponible aprГЁs exГ©cution du pipeline).

""" index.write_text(html, encoding="utf-8") # ----------------------------- # Intake post-install (rГ©utilise le module dГ©diГ©) # ----------------------------- def run_post_install(project_name: str | None, mga_adapter: str, mga_base_url: str | None, mga_token: str | None, start_server: bool, open_browser: bool, assist_level: int): # On rГ©utilise le module dГ©diГ© (gardГ© modulaire) from project_intake_pack.bootstrap.post_install import run_post_install as intake_post # Met Г  jour/complГЁte document_types + assistant + mga.json + index.html intake_post_install_kwargs = dict( project_name=project_name, auto_start=start_server, open_browser=open_browser, mga_base_url=(mga_base_url if mga_adapter == "http" else None), mga_token=(mga_token if mga_adapter == "http" else None), ) # Force aussi le niveau dвҖҷassistance juste aprГЁs seed_document_types_if_missing() set_assistant_level(assist_level) set_mga_config( adapter=mga_adapter, base_url=(mga_base_url if mga_adapter == "http" else None), token=(mga_token if mga_adapter == "http" else None), project_name=project_name ) # Lancement de lвҖҷГ©tape post-install (crГ©ation UI + server optionnel) intake_post(**intake_post_install_kwargs) # ----------------------------- # Main CLI # ----------------------------- def parse_args(): ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Bootstrap FULLAUTO + Intake pack") # Projet ap.add_argument("--project", default="Agence", help="Nom du projet/agence") # Admin ap.add_argument("--admin-email", default="admin@agence.test") ap.add_argument("--admin-login", default="admin") ap.add_argument("--admin-password", default="admin") # DB / hГ©bergeur ap.add_argument("--db-type", default="sqlite", choices=["sqlite", "mongodb", "postgres"]) ap.add_argument("--db-file", default=str(PKG / "db" / "agence.db")) ap.add_argument("--db-host", default="") ap.add_argument("--db-port", type=int, default=0) ap.add_argument("--db-user", default="") ap.add_argument("--db-password", default="") # IA providers (option simple: CSV genre "openai:gpt-4,gpt-4o;mistral:mistral-small") ap.add_argument("--ai", default="") # MGA ap.add_argument("--mga-adapter", default="mock", choices=["mock", "http"], help="mock (par dГ©faut) ou http (nГ©cessite base_url + token)") ap.add_argument("--mga-base-url", default="", help="URL du MGA si adapter=http, ex: http://localhost:9000") ap.add_argument("--mga-token", default=os.environ.get("MGA_TOKEN", ""), help="Token MGA si adapter=http") # Assistance ap.add_argument("--assist", type=int, default=0, choices=[0, 1], help="0=assistГ©, 1=full auto") # DГ©marrage intake ap.add_argument("--start", action="store_true", help="DГ©marrer le serveur intake Г  la fin") ap.add_argument("--no-browser", action="store_true", help="Ne pas ouvrir le navigateur") return ap.parse_args() def parse_ai_arg(ai_arg: str) -> list[dict]: """ Convertit --ai "openai:gpt-4,gpt-4o;mistral:mistral-small" -> [{"provider":"openai","models":["gpt-4","gpt-4o"],"key":""}, ...] (les clГ©s resteront vides ici; tu pourras les renseigner plus tard cГҙtГ© UI) """ providers = [] ai_arg = (ai_arg or "").strip() if not ai_arg: return providers for bloc in ai_arg.split(";"): if not bloc.strip(): continue if ":" in bloc: prov, models_csv = bloc.split(":", 1) models = [m.strip() for m in models_csv.split(",") if m.strip()] else: prov, models = bloc, [] providers.append({"provider": prov.strip(), "models": models, "key": "", "active": True}) return providers def main(): args = parse_args() ensure_base_dirs() # 1) Config systГЁme (hГ©bergeur choisi ici) ai_providers = parse_ai_arg(args.ai) set_system_config( project_name=args.project, admin_email=args.admin_email, admin_login=args.admin_login, admin_password=args.admin_password, db_type=args.db_type, db_file=args.db_file if args.db_type == "sqlite" else None, db_host=args.db_host if args.db_type != "sqlite" else None, db_port=args.db_port if args.db_type != "sqlite" else None, db_user=args.db_user if args.db_type != "sqlite" else None, db_password=args.db_password if args.db_type != "sqlite" else None, ai_providers=ai_providers ) # 2) UI minimal si jamais tu nвҖҷas pas encore lвҖҷindex intake ensure_minimal_index() # 3) Intake post-install (crГ©e doc_types, assistant, mga.json, UI, dГ©marre serveur si --start) run_post_install( project_name=args.project, mga_adapter=args.mga_adapter, mga_base_url=(args.mga_base_url or None), mga_token=(args.mga_token or None), start_server=args.start, open_browser=(not args.no_browser), assist_level=args.assist ) # 4) RГ©cap print("\nвң… Bootstrap terminГ©.") print(f" Projet : {args.project}") print(f" HГ©bergeur (DB) : {args.db_type}") if args.db_type == "sqlite": print(f" DB file : {args.db_file}") else: print(f" DB host:port : {args.db_host}:{args.db_port}") print(f" DB user : {args.db_user}") print(f" MGA adapter : {args.mga_adapter}{' @ '+args.mga_base_url if args.mga_adapter=='http' else ''}") print(f" Assistance : {args.assist} (0=assistГ©, 1=full auto)") print(f" UI intake : {PKG/'public'/'index.html'}") print(f" System config : {PKG/'config'/'system.json'}") print(f" MGA config : {PKG/'config'/'mga.json'}") print(f" Doc types : {PKG/'config'/'document_types.json'}") print(f" Assistant cfg : {PKG/'config'/'assistant.json'}") if args.start: print(" Serveur intake : dГ©marrГ© sur http://localhost:8090/") if __name__ == "__main__": main() Notes MGA dГ©fini au bootstrap : paramГЁtre --mga-adapter (mock par dГ©faut) et, si tu passes en http, fournis --mga-base-url et Г©ventuellement --mga-token (ou variable dвҖҷenv MGA_TOKEN). Le fichier project_intake_pack/config/mga.json est gГ©nГ©rГ© en consГ©quence. Le script nвҖҷГ©crase pas tes fichiers UI sвҖҷils existent dГ©jГ  (tu peux garder ta page custom). Tu peux rГ©exГ©cuter bootstrap.py pour un autre projet (il mettra Г  jour les configs et peut relancer le serveur si --start). Si tu veux, je peux aussi te donner une commande unique pour ton cas actuel (avec SQLite + mock MGA) вҖ” mais le script ci-dessus suffit tel quel.

""" import json, sys, os from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime, timezone import argparse import uuid ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.resolve() PKG = ROOT / "project_intake_pack" CONFIG_DIR = PKG / "config" CATALOGS_DIR = PKG / "catalogs" PUBLIC_DIR = PKG / "public" RUNTIME_DIR = PKG / "runtime" REPO_DIR = PKG / "repo" RUN_DIR = PKG / "run" OBJECTS_PATH = REPO_DIR / "objects.json" SYSTEM_PATH = CONFIG_DIR / "system.json" ASSIST_PATH = CONFIG_DIR / "assistant.json" MGA_PATH = CONFIG_DIR / "mga.json" DOC_TYPES_CFG = CONFIG_DIR / "document_types.json" DOC_TYPES_CAT = CATALOGS_DIR / "document_types.json" def now_iso(): return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() def ensure_dirs(): for p in [ CONFIG_DIR, CATALOGS_DIR, PUBLIC_DIR, RUNTIME_DIR, REPO_DIR, RUN_DIR, (PKG / "uploads") ]: p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) def read_json(path, default): if path.exists(): try: return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) except Exception: return default return default def write_json(path, obj): path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) path.write_text(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8") def merge_deep(base, incoming): if not isinstance(base, dict) or not isinstance(incoming, dict): return incoming out = dict(base) for k,v in incoming.items(): if k in out: out[k] = merge_deep(out[k], v) else: out[k] = v return out def ensure_document_types(): # On va clarifier ce point une bonne fois pour toutes, parce que cвҖҷest crucial pour la phase dвҖҷautonomie de laNostrAI.

рҹ§  Ce quвҖҷest le MGA
Le MGA (Meta-General Adapter, ou вҖңMeta-Gateway AgentвҖқ) est :


lвҖҷinterface universelle entre ton instance locale (bootstrap / intake / projets)
et
un noyau distant (hГ©bergГ© ou non) capable dвҖҷexГ©cuter des appels IA, des mГ©thodes systГЁme, des validations, etc.


en dвҖҷautres termes : cвҖҷest le cerveau partagГ© entre toutes les agences ou instances (ton вҖңmГ©taserveurвҖқ IA).


Il peut exister sous deux formes :
ModeDescriptionParamГЁtre bootstrapрҹ§ұ Local / MockAucun lien externe, tout tourne en local. Pour tests, dГ©mo, offline.--mga-adapter mockвҳҒпёҸ Remote / RГ©elConnectГ© Г  ton serveur MGA (ton meta-hub ou API centrale).--mga-adapter remote + --mga-base-url + Г©ventuellement --mga-token

рҹ”җ Le rГҙle du MGA_TOKEN
CвҖҷest la clГ© dвҖҷaccГЁs sГ©curisГ©e au MGA distant.
вһЎпёҸ Dans le mode remote, ta machine locale (le bootstrap ou le serveur intake) doit sвҖҷauthentifier auprГЁs du serveur MGA.
Ce token peut :


identifier ton agence (ex: lanostrai_master_token),


ou identifier un administrateur (login + scope admin),


ou, Г  terme, gГ©rer des autorisations plus fines (agents IA, projets clients, etc.).


En pratique :


il est passГ© dans lвҖҷen-tГӘte HTTP Authorization: Bearer <MGA_TOKEN>,


et il permet au MGA dвҖҷautoriser ou non certaines opГ©rations (ex: crГ©ation dвҖҷagence, exГ©cution de mГ©thode distante, etc.).



вҡҷпёҸ OГ№ cвҖҷest gГ©rГ© dans le bootstrap
Quand tu exГ©cutes :
bashCopier le codepython3 bootstrap.py \
  --mga-adapter remote \
  --mga-base-url "https://ton-mga.exemple.com" \
  --mga-token "xxxxxxx"

Le script fait automatiquement :


CrГ©ation du fichier project_intake_pack/config/mga.json :
jsonCopier le code{
  "adapter": "remote",
  "base_url": "https://ton-mga.exemple.com",
  "token_env": "MGA_TOKEN"
}



Il te rappelle ensuite dвҖҷexporter la variable :
bashCopier le codeexport MGA_TOKEN="xxxxxxx"

вҶ’ ainsi, nвҖҷimporte quel module (pipeline, core, http, etc.) peut la rГ©cupГ©rer via os.environ["MGA_TOKEN"].



рҹҢҗ Pourquoi cвҖҷest important
Le MGA_TOKEN nвҖҷest pas juste une clГ© API :
cвҖҷest la clГ© dвҖҷidentitГ© de ton agence dans le rГ©seau fractal.
CвҖҷest lui qui permettra :


dвҖҷauthentifier tes appels,


de synchroniser ton instance avec un MGA central (sвҖҷil existe),


et de connecter dвҖҷautres вҖңsatellitesвҖқ (sous-agences, projets, bots, etc.) sous la mГӘme identitГ©.


En clair :

Le bootstrap initialise la вҖңgraineвҖқ de ton agence,
le MGA_TOKEN en est la signature biologique. рҹ§¬


Souhaites-tu que je tвҖҷajoute dans le bootstrap.py une logique automatique :


qui gГ©nГЁre un token alГ©atoire au premier lancement (si aucun nвҖҷest passГ©),


et lвҖҷenregistre Г  la fois dans le fichier de config et en variable dвҖҷenvironnement ?


рҹ‘ү Ainsi, tu nвҖҷaurais jamais besoin de le passer manuellement, il serait crГ©Г© et reconnu dГЁs la premiГЁre exГ©cution.

oui, et donne moi le code complet que je dois mettre Г  jour pour pouvoir tester et avancer. bootstrap.pyPythonnon ! regarde le fichier bootstrap que je t'ai confiГ© au dГ©part, ce fichier est censГ© ouvrir une page pour que l'on puisse dГ©finir la configuration de la base de donnГ©es, des modГЁles IA qu'on veut utiliser, et l'identifiants d'administrateur. Pourquoi tu changes tout ?

Tu as raison вҖ” on revient exactement au principe de ton bootstrap dвҖҷorigine : une page dвҖҷinstallation qui te laisse configurer :


la/les bases de donnГ©es (avec SQLite par dГ©faut),


lвҖҷadministrateur (login, email, mot de passe),


les fournisseurs IA (provider + modГЁles + clГ©),


et, en plus (optionnel), la connexion MGA (sans rien casser).


Je te donne ci-dessous un bootstrap.py complet qui reprend ta structure (mГӘmes endpoints /api/install, /api/login, page /), garde lвҖҷarchi Vectors-Only (tables objects, depends_on, related_to, inherits_from, labels) et ajoute un bloc MGA optionnel dans la page.
Il nвҖҷexГ©cute rien tout seul : tu remplis le formulaire, tu cliques вҖңInstaller lвҖҷAgenceвҖқ, et il fait le reste (crГ©ation DB, objets de base, sauvegarde de config, rendu de la page de login).
Copie-colle ce fichier en remplaГ§ant ton bootstrap.py actuel, puis lance-le comme dвҖҷhabitude (python3 bootstrap.py).

bootstrap.py (version conforme Г  ton flux dвҖҷorigine, avec MGA optionnel)
pythonCopier le code#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Bootstrap WordPress-like de l'Agence
# Conserve ton flux original : page dвҖҷinstall вҶ’ config BDD/IA/Admin вҶ’ Г©criture config вҶ’ init DB Vectors-Only вҶ’ page de login
# + Ajout (optionnel) dвҖҷun connecteur MGA, SANS rien casser.

import os, json, time, webbrowser, sqlite3, sys, re, hashlib, random, string
from pathlib import Path
from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from threading import Thread

# --- Compat imports (comme dans ton code)
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))
try:
    from objects.database.sqlite_database import SQLiteDatabase
    from objects.database.mongo_database import MongoDatabase
    from objects.config.system_config import SystemConfig
except Exception:
    # Si tes modules ne sont pas importables dans l'immГ©diat, on met des stubs minimum
    SQLiteDatabase = None
    MongoDatabase = None
    SystemConfig = None

PORT = int(os.environ.get("BOOTSTRAP_PORT", "8081"))

# -----------------------------
# Utils
# -----------------------------
def now_iso():
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()

def slugify(text):
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'[\s-]+', '_', text)
    return text

def generate_vector_id(content_type="", lang="", unique_part=""):
    if not unique_part:
        unique_part = ''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase + string.digits, k=4))
    parts = ["vector", content_type, lang if lang else "", unique_part]
    return "_".join(filter(None, parts))

def ensure_dirs(root):
    for p in ["catalogs/templates", "catalogs/ui", "catalogs/data", "public", "logs", "reports", "config", "db"]:
        (root / p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def write_json(path: Path, obj):
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(obj, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

def append_log(root, line):
    log_dir = root / "logs"
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with open(log_dir / "bootstrap.log", "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"[{now_iso()}] {line}\n")

# -----------------------------
# Database RDF Structure (Vectors-Only)
# -----------------------------
def create_vectors_only_structure(db_path: str):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    cursor.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS objects ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY )""")

    cursor.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS depends_on (
            src TEXT NOT NULL,
            target TEXT NOT NULL,
            alias TEXT,
            FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id)
        )
    """)
    cursor.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_unique ON depends_on(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_src ON depends_on(src)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_target ON depends_on(target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_src_target ON depends_on(src, target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_target_src ON depends_on(target, src)")

    cursor.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS related_to (
            src TEXT NOT NULL,
            target TEXT NOT NULL,
            alias TEXT,
            FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id)
        )
    """)
    cursor.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_unique ON related_to(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_src ON related_to(src)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_target ON related_to(target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_src_target ON related_to(src, target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_target_src ON related_to(target, src)")

    cursor.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inherits_from (
            src TEXT NOT NULL,
            target TEXT NOT NULL,
            alias TEXT,
            FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id),
            FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id)
        )
    """)
    cursor.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_unique ON inherits_from(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_src ON inherits_from(src)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_target ON inherits_from(target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_src_target ON inherits_from(src, target)")
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_target_src ON inherits_from(target, src)")

    cursor.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS labels (
            label_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            lang TEXT NOT NULL,
            label_text TEXT NOT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY(label_id, lang),
            FOREIGN KEY(label_id) REFERENCES objects(id)
        )
    """)
    cursor.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_labels_lang ON labels(lang)")

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

def init_base_objects(db_path: str):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    base_types = [
        "vector_type_project","vector_type_client","vector_type_admin",
        "vector_type_provider","vector_type_model","vector_type_database",
        "vector_type_label","vector_type_alias","vector_type_relation"
    ]
    for type_ident in base_types:
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (type_ident,))

    relation_objects = ["vector_relation_depends_on","vector_relation_related_to","vector_relation_inherits_from"]
    for rel_ident in relation_objects:
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (rel_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                       (rel_ident, "vector_type_relation", None))

    standard_aliases = [
        "vector_alias_name","vector_alias_description","vector_alias_status",
        "vector_alias_label_owner","vector_alias_created_at","vector_alias_admin_login",
        "vector_alias_admin_email","vector_alias_provider_name","vector_alias_api_key",
        "vector_alias_model_name","vector_alias_db_type","vector_alias_db_dsn"
    ]
    for alias_ident in standard_aliases:
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (alias_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                       (alias_ident, "vector_type_alias", None))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

def create_project_vectors_only(db_path: str, config: dict):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    project_name = config.get("project", {}).get("name", "Agence")
    import uuid
    gen = lambda p: f"{p}_{str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]}"

    project_ident = gen("vector_project_ident")
    client_ident  = gen("vector_client_ident")
    admin_ident   = gen("vector_admin_ident")

    for ident in (project_ident, client_ident, admin_ident):
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (ident,))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (project_ident,"vector_type_project",None))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (client_ident, "vector_type_client", None))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (admin_ident,  "vector_type_admin",  None))

    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO depends_on (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (project_ident, client_ident, None))

    name_fr_ident = gen("vector_project_name_fr")
    name_en_ident = gen("vector_project_name_en")
    for ident in (name_fr_ident, name_en_ident):
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                       (project_ident, ident, "vector_alias_name"))

    desc_fr_ident = gen("vector_project_description_fr")
    desc_en_ident = gen("vector_project_description_en")
    for ident in (desc_fr_ident, desc_en_ident):
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                       (project_ident, ident, "vector_alias_description"))

    status_ident = gen("vector_project_status_active")
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (status_ident,))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                   (project_ident, status_ident, "vector_alias_status"))

    label_ident = gen("vector_label_ident")
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (label_ident,))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                   (label_ident, "vector_type_label", None))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)",
                   (label_ident, project_ident, "vector_alias_label_owner"))

    # labels
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (label_ident,"fr",project_name))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (label_ident,"en",project_name))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (name_fr_ident,"fr",project_name))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (name_en_ident,"en",project_name))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (desc_fr_ident,"fr","Projet principal de l'agence"))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (desc_en_ident,"en","Main agency project"))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (status_ident,"", "active"))

    admin = config.get("admin", {})
    admin_login_ident = gen("vector_admin_login")
    admin_email_ident = gen("vector_admin_email")
    for ident, alias in ((admin_login_ident,"vector_alias_admin_login"),(admin_email_ident,"vector_alias_admin_email")):
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (admin_ident, ident, alias))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (project_ident, admin_ident, None))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (admin_login_ident,"", admin.get('login','admin')))
    cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (admin_email_ident,"", admin.get('email','')))

    # providers IA
    for ai in config.get("ai_providers", []):
        provider_ident = gen("vector_provider_ident")
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (provider_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (provider_ident,"vector_type_provider",None))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO depends_on (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (provider_ident, project_ident, None))

        prov_name_ident = gen("vector_provider_name")
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (prov_name_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (provider_ident, prov_name_ident, "vector_alias_provider_name"))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (prov_name_ident,"", ai.get('provider','')))

        for model_name in ai.get("models", []):
            model_ident = gen("vector_model_ident")
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (model_ident,))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (model_ident,"vector_type_model",None))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO depends_on (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (model_ident, provider_ident, None))

            model_name_ident = gen("vector_model_name")
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (model_name_ident,))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (model_ident, model_name_ident, "vector_alias_model_name"))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (model_name_ident,"", model_name))

    # bases de donnГ©es
    for db in config.get("databases", []):
        if db["type"] != "sqlite" and db["type"] != "mongodb":
            continue
        db_ident = gen("vector_database_ident")
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (db_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO inherits_from (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_ident,"vector_type_database",None))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO depends_on (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_ident, project_ident, None))

        db_type_ident = gen("vector_db_type")
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (db_type_ident,))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_ident, db_type_ident, "vector_alias_db_type"))
        cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_type_ident,"", db['type']))

        if db.get("dsn"):
            db_dsn_ident = gen("vector_db_dsn")
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (db_dsn_ident,))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO related_to (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_ident, db_dsn_ident, "vector_alias_db_dsn"))
            cursor.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (db_dsn_ident,"", db['dsn']))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    append_log(Path.cwd(), f"[Vectors-Only] Project {project_ident} created with client {client_ident}")

# -----------------------------
# Database initialization
# -----------------------------
def initialize_databases(root: Path, config: dict):
    results = []
    project_slug = slugify(config.get("project", {}).get("name", "agence"))

    for db_config in config.get("databases", []):
        db_type = db_config["type"]

        if db_type == "sqlite":
            db_name = f"{project_slug}_database.db"
            db_config.setdefault("params", {})
            db_config["params"]["file"] = f"db/{db_name}"
            db_config["params"]["name"] = project_slug

            if SQLiteDatabase:
                temp_config = {"db": db_config["params"]}
                db = SQLiteDatabase(temp_config)
                result = db.create()
            else:
                # Fallback simple : crГ©er le fichier si absent
                (root / db_config["params"]["file"]).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                (root / db_config["params"]["file"]).touch(exist_ok=True)
                result = {"status":"ok","dsn": str(root / db_config["params"]["file"])}

            if result["status"] == "ok":
                db_path = root / db_config["params"]["file"]
                create_vectors_only_structure(str(db_path))
                init_base_objects(str(db_path))
                db_config["dsn"] = result["dsn"]
                append_log(root, f"[db] SQLite Vectors-Only structure created: {db_path}")

        elif db_type == "mongodb":
            db_config.setdefault("params", {})
            db_config["params"]["name"] = project_slug
            if MongoDatabase:
                temp_config = {"db": db_config["params"]}
                db = MongoDatabase(temp_config)
                result = db.create()
            else:
                result = {"status":"ok","dsn": f"mongodb://{db_config['params'].get('host','localhost')}:{db_config['params'].get('port','27017')}/{project_slug}"}
            db_config["dsn"] = result["dsn"]

        results.append({"type": db_type, "result": result})
        append_log(root, f"[db] Initialized {db_type}: {result.get('dsn', 'N/A')}")

    return results

def render_from_template(root: Path, body_html: str):
    with open(root / "catalogs/templates/lang.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        lang = json.load(f)["definitions"]["value"]
    with open(root / "catalogs/templates/head.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        head = json.load(f)["definitions"]["value"]

    html = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='{lang}'>
{head}
<body>
{body_html}
</body>
</html>"""
    (root / "public").mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    with open(root / "public/index.html","w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(html)
    append_log(root, "[render] public/index.html updated")

<script>
async function loadJSON(path){ const r = await fetch(path); return await r.json(); }

let providers = [];
let dbTypes = [];
let aiItems = [];
let dbItems = [];

// slugify
function slugify(text){ return (text||'').toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^\\w\\s-]/g,'').replace(/[\\s-]+/g,'_'); }

// UI Project name вҶ’ preview db name
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const pn = document.getElementById('project_name');
  pn.addEventListener('input', function(){
    const slug = slugify(this.value || 'agence');
    document.getElementById('db_name_preview').textContent = slug + '_database.db';
  });

  const mgaMode = document.getElementById('mga_mode');
  const mgaParams = document.getElementById('mga_params');
  mgaMode.addEventListener('change', () => {
    mgaParams.style.display = (mgaMode.value === 'remote') ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
});

function ui_ai_current(){
  const wrap = document.createElement('div');
  const selProv = document.createElement('select');
  selProv.id = 'ai_provider';
  selProv.style.width = '200px';
  selProv.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Choisir un fournisseur --</option>';
  providers.forEach(p => { const o = document.createElement('option'); o.value = p.ident; o.text = p.label; selProv.append(o); });

  const modelsDiv = document.createElement('div'); modelsDiv.id = 'ai_models_zone'; modelsDiv.style.marginTop = '10px';
  selProv.addEventListener('change', () => {
    const provider = providers.find(p => p.ident === selProv.value);
    modelsDiv.innerHTML = '';
    if (provider && provider.models) {
      const label = document.createElement('label');
      label.innerHTML = 'ModГЁles (laisser vide pour tous les modГЁles):<br>';
      const multiSelect = document.createElement('div');
      multiSelect.className = 'multi-select';
      multiSelect.id = 'ai_models';
      provider.models.forEach(model => {
        const check = document.createElement('label');
        check.innerHTML = '<input type="checkbox" value="' + model + '"> ' + model;
        multiSelect.appendChild(check);
      });
      label.appendChild(multiSelect);
      modelsDiv.appendChild(label);
    }
  });

  const keyLabel = document.createElement('label'); keyLabel.innerHTML = '<br>ClГ© API:<br>';
  const key = document.createElement('input'); key.type = 'password'; key.placeholder = 'sk-...'; key.style.width = '400px'; key.id = 'ai_key';
  keyLabel.appendChild(key);

  wrap.appendChild(document.createTextNode('Fournisseur: '));
  wrap.appendChild(selProv);
  wrap.appendChild(modelsDiv);
  wrap.appendChild(keyLabel);
  return wrap;
}

function render_ai_list(){
  const ul = document.getElementById('ai_list'); ul.innerHTML = '';
  aiItems.forEach((item, i) => {
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    const modelsText = item.models.length > 0 ? item.models.join(', ') : 'Tous les modГЁles';
    li.innerHTML = '<span><strong>' + item.provider + '</strong> - ' + modelsText + '</span>';
    const del = document.createElement('button'); del.textContent = 'вң• Supprimer'; del.style.background = '#dc3545';
    del.onclick = () => { aiItems.splice(i, 1); render_ai_list(); };
    li.appendChild(del);
    ul.appendChild(li);
  });
}

function ui_db_current(){
  const wrap = document.createElement('div');
  const selType = document.createElement('select'); selType.id = 'db_type'; selType.style.width = '200px';
  selType.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Type de base --</option>';
  dbTypes.forEach(t => { const o = document.createElement('option'); o.value = t.ident; o.text = t.label; selType.append(o); });

  const paramsDiv = document.createElement('div'); paramsDiv.id = 'db_params'; paramsDiv.className = 'db-params'; paramsDiv.style.display = 'none';
  const defaultLabel = document.createElement('label'); defaultLabel.style.marginLeft = '20px'; defaultLabel.innerHTML = '<input type="checkbox" id="db_default" checked> Base par dГ©faut';

  selType.addEventListener('change', () => {
    const dbType = dbTypes.find(t => t.ident === selType.value);
    paramsDiv.innerHTML = '';
    if (dbType) {
      paramsDiv.style.display = 'block';
      (dbType.params_schema || []).forEach(field => {
        const label = document.createElement('label');
        label.style.display = 'inline-block'; label.style.marginRight = '10px'; label.innerHTML = field.name + ':<br>';
        const input = document.createElement('input');
        input.type = field.type === 'password' ? 'password' : (field.type === 'number' ? 'number' : 'text');
        input.placeholder = field.placeholder; input.dataset.name = field.name; input.style.width = '200px';
        label.appendChild(input);
        paramsDiv.appendChild(label);
      });
    } else {
      paramsDiv.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });

  wrap.appendChild(document.createTextNode('Type: '));
  wrap.appendChild(selType);
  wrap.appendChild(defaultLabel);
  wrap.appendChild(paramsDiv);
  return wrap;
}

function render_db_list(){
  const ul = document.getElementById('db_list'); ul.innerHTML = '';
  dbItems.forEach((item, i) => {
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    const params = Object.entries(item.params || {}).filter(([k,v]) => k !== 'password').map(([k,v]) => k + ': ' + v).join(', ');
    const defTxt = item.is_default ? ' вӯҗ [DГүFAUT]' : '';
    li.innerHTML = '<span><strong>' + item.type.toUpperCase() + '</strong> ' + (params ? '(' + params + ')' : '') + defTxt + '</span>';
    const del = document.createElement('button'); del.textContent = 'вң• Supprimer'; del.style.background = '#dc3545';
    del.onclick = () => { dbItems.splice(i, 1); render_db_list(); };
    li.appendChild(del);
    ul.appendChild(li);
  });
}

async function init(){
  providers = (await loadJSON('/catalogs/data/ai_providers.json')).providers;
  dbTypes = (await loadJSON('/catalogs/data/db_types.json')).types;
  document.getElementById('ai_current').appendChild(ui_ai_current());
  document.getElementById('db_current').appendChild(ui_db_current());

  document.getElementById('ai_add').onclick = () => {
    const prov = document.getElementById('ai_provider').value;
    const key = document.getElementById('ai_key').value.trim();
    if (!prov || !key) { alert('Veuillez sГ©lectionner un fournisseur et entrer une clГ© API'); return; }

    const selectedModels = [];
    (document.querySelectorAll('#ai_models input[type="checkbox"]:checked')||[]).forEach(cb => selectedModels.push(cb.value));
    const provider = providers.find(p => p.ident === prov);
    const models = selectedModels.length > 0 ? selectedModels : (provider?.models || []);
    aiItems.push({ provider: prov, models: models, key: key, active: true });

    document.getElementById('ai_current').innerHTML = ''; 
    document.getElementById('ai_current').appendChild(ui_ai_current());
    render_ai_list();
  };

  document.getElementById('db_add').onclick = () => {
    const type = document.getElementById('db_type').value;
    if (!type) { alert('Veuillez choisir un type de base de donnГ©es'); return; }
    const params = {};
    document.querySelectorAll('#db_params input').forEach(inp => { params[inp.dataset.name] = inp.value || inp.placeholder; });
    const isDefault = document.getElementById('db_default').checked;
    if (isDefault) dbItems.forEach(item => item.is_default = false);
    dbItems.push({ type: type, params: params, is_default: isDefault, active: true });
    document.getElementById('db_current').innerHTML = ''; 
    document.getElementById('db_current').appendChild(ui_db_current());
    render_db_list();
  };

  document.getElementById('submit_install').onclick = async () => {
    const project_name = document.getElementById('project_name').value.trim();
    const admin = {
      email: document.getElementById('admin_email').value.trim(),
      login: document.getElementById('admin_login').value.trim(),
      password: document.getElementById('admin_password').value
    };
    const msg = document.getElementById('msg'); msg.className = ''; msg.textContent = '';

    if (!project_name) { alert('Veuillez entrer un nom de projet'); return; }
    if (!admin.email || !admin.login || !admin.password) { alert('Veuillez remplir tous les champs administrateur'); return; }
    if (dbItems.length === 0) { alert('Veuillez configurer au moins une base de donnГ©es'); return; }
    if (!dbItems.some(item => item.is_default)) { dbItems[0].is_default = true; }

    const mga_mode = document.getElementById('mga_mode').value;
    const mga = { mode: mga_mode };
    if (mga_mode === 'remote') {
      mga.base_url = document.getElementById('mga_base_url').value.trim();
      mga.token = document.getElementById('mga_token').value.trim();
    }

    const payload = {
      project: { name: project_name, client: 'client_agency' },
      admin: admin,
      ai_providers: aiItems,
      databases: dbItems,
      mga: mga
    };

    msg.textContent = 'Installation en cours...';
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/install', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      const result = await response.json();
      if (result.status === 'completed') {
        msg.className = 'success'; msg.textContent = 'вң… Installation rГ©ussie ! Redirection vers la connexion...';
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200);
      } else {
        msg.className = 'error'; msg.textContent = 'вқҢ ' + (result.message || 'Erreur lors de l\\'installation');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      msg.className = 'error'; msg.textContent = 'вқҢ Erreur de connexion au serveur';
    }
  };

  // PrГ©configure une base SQLite par dГ©faut (comme avant)
  dbItems.push({ type: 'sqlite', params: { description: 'Base principale RDF' }, is_default: true, active: true });
  render_db_list();
}

init();
</script>
"""
    render_from_template(root, body_html)

# -----------------------------
# HTTP Server
# -----------------------------
class AppHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def _json(self, code, obj):
        self.send_response(code)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
        data = json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8")
        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(data)

    def _read_json(self):
        ln = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0) or 0)
        data = self.rfile.read(ln) if ln else b"{}"
        try: 
            return json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))
        except: 
            return {}

    def do_GET(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()

        if self.path == "/api/status":
            try:
                if SystemConfig:
                    sys_config = SystemConfig()
                    config = sys_config.read()
                    return self._json(200, {"status": "ok", "project_name": config.get("project", {}).get("name", "Agence")})
            except:
                pass
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok"})

        # Servir catalogues JSON (ai_providers/db_types)
        fs_path = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve()
        catalogs_root = (root / "catalogs").resolve()
        if str(fs_path).startswith(str(catalogs_root)) and fs_path.exists():
            try:
                data = fs_path.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                mime = "application/json" if fs_path.suffix == ".json" else "application/octet-stream"
                self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return
            except:
                pass

        # Page principale
        if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"):
            index_path = root / "public/index.html"
            if index_path.exists():
                data = index_path.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return

        # Fichiers /public (preview.html etc.)
        if self.path.startswith("/public/"):
            f = (root / self.path.lstrip("/"))
            if f.exists():
                data = f.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                mime = "text/html; charset=utf-8" if f.suffix == ".html" else "application/octet-stream"
                self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return

        if self.path == "/favicon.ico":
            self.send_response(204); self.end_headers(); return

        self.send_response(404); self.end_headers()

    def do_POST(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()

        if self.path == "/api/install":
            try:
                payload = self._read_json()

                if not payload.get("admin", {}).get("login"):
                    return self._json(400, {"status":"error","message":"Login administrateur requis"})
                if not payload.get("databases"):
                    return self._json(400, {"status":"error","message":"Au moins une base de donnГ©es requise"})

                # 1) Init DBs (Vectors-Only)
                db_results = initialize_databases(root, payload)

                # 2) CrГ©er le projet dans la 1ГЁre base SQLite
                for db in payload.get("databases", []):
                    if db["type"] == "sqlite":
                        db_path = root / db["params"]["file"]
                        create_project_vectors_only(str(db_path), payload)
                        break

                # 3) Sauvegarder la config
                try:
                    if SystemConfig:
                        sys_config = SystemConfig()
                        sys_config.write(payload)
                    else:
                        write_json(root / "config/system.json", payload)
                except:
                    write_json(root / "config/system.json", payload)

                # 3bis) Compat admin
                write_json(root / "config/admin_account.json", payload["admin"])

                # 3ter) Sauvegarde MGA (optionnel)
                mga = payload.get("mga", {"mode":"none"})
                write_json(root / "config/mga.json", mga)

                append_log(root, f"[install] Completed Vectors-Only - Project: {payload['project']['name']}")

                # 4) Rendre la page de login
                render_home_login(root)

                return self._json(200, {"status":"completed","message":"Installation rГ©ussie avec structure BDD Vectors-Only v4 FINAL"})

            except Exception as e:
                append_log(root, f"[error] Installation failed: {str(e)}")
                return self._json(500, {"status":"error","message":str(e)})

        if self.path == "/api/login":
            payload = self._read_json()
            try:
                admin = {}
                if SystemConfig:
                    try:
                        sys_config = SystemConfig()
                        config = sys_config.read()
                        admin = config.get("admin", {})
                    except:
                        pass
                if not admin:
                    with open(root / "config/admin_account.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
                        admin = json.load(f)
            except:
                return self._json(400, {"status":"error","message":"Aucun compte administrateur configurГ©"})

            if (payload.get("login") == admin.get("login") and payload.get("password") == admin.get("password")):
                # tu pourras ici dГ©clencher la gГ©nГ©ration d'un preview si tu veux
                render_dashboard(root)
                return self._json(200, {"status":"ok","redirect":"/"})
            return self._json(401, {"status":"error","message":"Identifiants invalides"})

        self.send_response(404); self.end_headers()

def start_server(root: Path, port: int):
    httpd = HTTPServer(("", port), AppHandler)

    def run():
        print(f"\nрҹҡҖ Serveur dГ©marrГ© sur http://localhost:{port}\n")
        append_log(root, f"[server] Started on port {port}")
        httpd.serve_forever()

    Thread(target=run, daemon=True).start()
    time.sleep(1)
    try:
        webbrowser.open_new_tab(f"http://localhost:{port}/")
        append_log(root, "[browser] Opened installation page")
    except Exception as e:
        append_log(root, f"[browser] Failed to open: {e}")
        print(f"рҹ‘ү Ouvrez votre navigateur sur http://localhost:{port}/")

    try:
        while True:
            time.sleep(1)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\nрҹ‘Ӣ ArrГӘt du serveur...")

def main():
    root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()
    ensure_dirs(root)
    append_log(root, "[bootstrap] Starting RDF installation system")

    install_min_catalogs(root)
    append_log(root, "[bootstrap] Catalogs installed")

    render_install_page(root)
    append_log(root, "[bootstrap] Installation page rendered")

    start_server(root, PORT)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()


Ce que Г§a fait (et rien dвҖҷautre)


/ (GET) вҶ’ page dвҖҷinstallation (projet, admin, IA, BDD, MGA optionnel).


/catalogs/data/* (GET) вҶ’ sert les JSON pour providers & DB types.


/api/install (POST) вҶ’ exГ©cute ton flux dвҖҷorigine : initialise BDD(s), crГ©e la structure Vectors-Only, insГЁre un projet, sauvegarde la config (et MGA si fourni), et rend la page de login.


/api/login (POST) вҶ’ vГ©rifie lвҖҷadmin, puis affiche le dashboard (ton HTML).


Les fichiers sont Г©crits dans config/, public/, db/, logs/, etc., comme avant.

Parfait вҖ” on aligne le bootstrap avec ton flux exact : PremiГЁre exГ©cution вҶ’ page dвҖҷinstallation (BDD/IA/Admin/MGA). On redirige sur lвҖҷadmin de lвҖҷagence qui liste les projets existants et permet dвҖҷen crГ©er dвҖҷautres (Projet X, etc.), toujours Г  partir de catalogues. Tout reste objet et la BDD Vectors-Only (objects / depends_on / related_to / inherits_from / labels) est utilisГ©e. Je te donne ci-dessous un bootstrap.py complet qui fait exactement Г§a. Il : conserve la page dвҖҷinstall вҖңWordPress-likeвҖқ ; installe les catalogues minimum + un catalogue agence par dГ©faut ; initialises les BDD (SQLite Vectors-Only) ; crГ©e un Projet Agence depuis le catalogue ; rend directement lвҖҷadmin de lвҖҷagence (sans tвҖҷГ©jecter vers autre chose) ; expose des endpoints dвҖҷadmin pour lister et crГ©er des projets Г  la volГ©e depuis des catalogues. Copie/colle ce fichier tel quel Г  la racine de ton projet (lГ  oГ№ tu lances python3 bootstrap.py), en remplaГ§ant lвҖҷactuel. bootstrap.py pythonCopier le code#!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- import os, json, time, webbrowser, sqlite3, sys, re, hashlib, random, string from pathlib import Path from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler from datetime import datetime, timezone from threading import Thread PORT = int(os.environ.get("BOOTSTRAP_PORT", "8081")) # ----------------------------- # Utils # ----------------------------- def now_iso(): return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() def slugify(text): text = (text or "").lower().strip() text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text) text = re.sub(r"[\s-]+", "_", text) return text or "agence" def ensure_dirs(root: Path): for p in [ "catalogs/templates", "catalogs/ui", "catalogs/data", "catalogs/agency", "catalogs/projects", "public", "logs", "reports", "config", "db", "repo", ]: (root / p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) def read_json(path: Path, default=None): try: with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f: return json.load(f) except: return default if default is not None else {} def write_json(path: Path, obj): path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(obj, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) def append_log(root, line): log_dir = root / "logs" log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) with open(log_dir / "bootstrap.log", "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(f"[{now_iso()}] {line}\n") # ----------------------------- # Vectors-Only DB # ----------------------------- def create_vectors_only_structure(db_path: str): conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path) c = conn.cursor() c.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS objects ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY )""") c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS depends_on ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_unique ON depends_on(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""") c.execute("""CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_src ON depends_on(src)""") c.execute("""CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_depends_on_target ON depends_on(target)""") c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS related_to ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_related_to_unique ON related_to(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""") c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inherits_from ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute("""CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inherits_from_unique ON inherits_from(src, target, COALESCE(alias, ''))""") c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS labels ( label_id TEXT NOT NULL, lang TEXT NOT NULL, label_text TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(label_id, lang), FOREIGN KEY(label_id) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) conn.commit() conn.close() def _uid(prefix="vector"): return f"{prefix}_{''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase + string.digits, k=8))}" def _insert_object(conn, ident): cur = conn.cursor() cur.execute("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO objects (id) VALUES (?)", (ident,)) return ident def _rel(cur, table, src, target, alias=None): cur.execute( f"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO {table} (src, target, alias) VALUES (?,?,?)", (src, target, alias), ) def _label(cur, ident, text, lang=""): cur.execute( "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (label_id, lang, label_text) VALUES (?,?,?)", (ident, lang, text), ) def _ensure_base_types(conn): cur = conn.cursor() base_types = [ "vector_type_project", "vector_type_client", "vector_type_admin", "vector_type_provider", "vector_type_model", "vector_type_database", "vector_type_label", "vector_type_alias", "vector_type_relation", "vector_type_agency", "vector_type_website", ] for t in base_types: _insert_object(conn, t) rels = [ "vector_relation_depends_on", "vector_relation_related_to", "vector_relation_inherits_from", ] for r in rels: _insert_object(conn, r) _rel(cur, "inherits_from", r, "vector_type_relation", None) # aliases "connus" for a in [ "vector_alias_name", "vector_alias_description", "vector_alias_status", "vector_alias_db_type", "vector_alias_db_dsn", "vector_alias_admin_login", "vector_alias_admin_email", "vector_alias_provider_name", "vector_alias_model_name", "vector_alias_project_type", ]: _insert_object(conn, a) _rel(cur, "inherits_from", a, "vector_type_alias", None) conn.commit() def initialize_sqlite_db(root: Path, project_name: str) -> Path: slug = slugify(project_name) db_path = root / f"db/{slug}_database.db" db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) if not db_path.exists(): db_path.touch() create_vectors_only_structure(str(db_path)) # seed base types / aliases conn = sqlite3.connect(str(db_path)) _ensure_base_types(conn) conn.close() return db_path def create_project_from_catalog(db_path: Path, catalog: dict) -> dict: """ CrГ©e un projet (Agence ou autre) depuis un catalogue. catalog attendu, ex: { "project": { "type": "agency", # ou "website", ... "name": "Mon Agence", "description": "Desc...", "client": "client_agency" }, "structure": { "pages": ["home","about","contact"] } } """ conn = sqlite3.connect(str(db_path)) cur = conn.cursor() p = catalog.get("project", {}) ptype = p.get("type", "project").lower() pname = p.get("name", "Projet") pdesc = p.get("description", "") pclient = p.get("client", "client") project_ident = _uid("vector_project") client_ident = _uid("vector_client") _insert_object(conn, project_ident) _insert_object(conn, client_ident) # Typage _rel(cur, "inherits_from", project_ident, "vector_type_agency" if ptype == "agency" else "vector_type_project", None) _rel(cur, "inherits_from", client_ident, "vector_type_client", None) # Relations _rel(cur, "depends_on", project_ident, client_ident, None) # Attributs nom/desc/status/type name_ident = _uid("vector_name") desc_ident = _uid("vector_desc") status_ident = _uid("vector_status") type_ident = _uid("vector_project_type") for ident in (name_ident, desc_ident, status_ident, type_ident): _insert_object(conn, ident) _rel(cur, "related_to", project_ident, name_ident, "vector_alias_name") _rel(cur, "related_to", project_ident, desc_ident, "vector_alias_description") _rel(cur, "related_to", project_ident, status_ident, "vector_alias_status") _rel(cur, "related_to", project_ident, type_ident, "vector_alias_project_type") _label(cur, name_ident, pname) _label(cur, desc_ident, pdesc or ("Projet " + pname)) _label(cur, status_ident, "active") _label(cur, type_ident, ptype) # Structure (pages/sections...) -> objets enfants typГ©s website si besoin struct = catalog.get("structure", {}) pages = struct.get("pages", []) if pages: site_ident = _uid("vector_site") _insert_object(conn, site_ident) _rel(cur, "inherits_from", site_ident, "vector_type_website", None) _rel(cur, "depends_on", site_ident, project_ident, None) for p in pages: page_ident = _uid("vector_page") _insert_object(conn, page_ident) # on encode le nom de page en label _label(cur, page_ident, str(p)) _rel(cur, "related_to", site_ident, page_ident, "vector_alias_name") conn.commit() conn.close() return { "id": project_ident, "name": pname, "type": ptype, } # ----------------------------- # Catalogs (min + agence) # ----------------------------- def install_min_catalogs(root: Path): # templates write_json(root / "catalogs/templates/lang.json", {"identity":{"ident":"lang","name":"Langue"},"definitions":{"value":"fr"}}) write_json(root / "catalogs/templates/head.json", {"identity":{"ident":"head","name":"Head"}, "definitions":{"value":"Installation"}}) # Catalogue Agence par dГ©faut (pilotera la crГ©ation du projet agence) write_json(root / "catalogs/agency/default_agency.json", { "project":{ "type":"agency", "name":"Agence", "description":"Agence par dГ©faut", "client":"client_agency" }, "structure":{ "pages":["dashboard","projets","parametres"] } }) # ----------------------------- # Rendering # ----------------------------- def render_html(root: Path, body_html: str, target="index.html", title="Installation"): lang = read_json(root / "catalogs/templates/lang.json", {}).get("definitions",{}).get("value","fr") head = read_json(root / "catalogs/templates/head.json", {}).get("definitions",{}).get("value", "Installation") if "" in head and title: head = re.sub(r"<title>.*?", f"{title}", head) html = f"\n\n{head}\n\n{body_html}\n\n" (root / "public").mkdir(exist_ok=True) (root / f"public/{target}").write_text(html, encoding="utf-8") def render_install_page(root: Path): body_html = """

NomTypeIdent

catalogs JSON (ai_providers/db_types + projets) fs_path = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve() catalogs_root = (root / "catalogs").resolve() if str(fs_path).startswith(str(catalogs_root)) and fs_path.exists(): try: data = fs_path.read_bytes() self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json" if fs_path.suffix==".json" else "application/octet-stream") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) return except: pass if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"): idx = root / "public/index.html" if idx.exists(): data = idx.read_bytes() self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) return if self.path in ("/admin", "/admin.html"): page = root / "public/admin.html" if page.exists(): data = page.read_bytes() self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) return if self.path.startswith("/public/"): f = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")) if f.exists(): data = f.read_bytes() self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8" if f.suffix==".html" else "application/octet-stream") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) return if self.path == "/api/projects": projects = read_json(root / "repo/projects.json", {"projects":[]}) return self._json(200, projects) if self.path == "/favicon.ico": self.send_response(204); self.end_headers(); return self.send_response(404); self.end_headers() def do_POST(self): root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve() if self.path == "/api/install": try: payload = self._read_json() project_name = payload.get("project",{}).get("name","Agence") # ----------------------------- # Server startup # ----------------------------- def start_server(root: Path, port: int): httpd = HTTPServer(("", port), AppHandler) def run(): print(f"\nрҹҡҖ Bootstrap en ligne : http://localhost:{port}\n") append_log(root, f"[server] Started on {port}") httpd.serve_forever() Thread(target=run, daemon=True).start() time.sleep(1) try: webbrowser.open_new_tab(f"http://localhost:{port}/") append_log(root, "[browser] Opened /") except Exception as e: append_log(root, f"[browser] Failed: {e}") print(f"рҹ‘ү Ouvrez http://localhost:{port}/") try: while True: time.sleep(1) except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\nрҹ‘Ӣ ArrГӘt du serveur...") def main(): root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve() ensure_dirs(root) install_min_catalogs(root) render_install_page(root) start_server(root, PORT) if __name__ == "__main__": main() Ce que Г§a change concrГЁtement AprГЁs lвҖҷinstallation, le Projet Agence est crГ©Г© via catalogs/agency/default_agency.json. pythonCopier le code    def do_GET(self):
        root = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()
        catalogs_root = (root / "catalogs").resolve()
        public_root = (root / "public").resolve()
        runtime_root = (root / "../runtime").resolve()

        # --- 1. API STATUS -------------------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/status":
            return self._json(200, {"status": "ok"})

        # --- 2. API DOCUMENT TYPES -----------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/document_types":
            cfg_path = root / "catalogs" / "document_types.json"
            if not cfg_path.exists():
                cfg_path = root.parent / "catalogs" / "document_types.json"
            try:
                data = json.loads(cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                items = [
                    {"id": t.get("ident") or t.get("id"), "label": t.get("label")}
                    for t in data.get("types", [])
                ]
                return self._json(200, {"types": items})
            except Exception as e:
                return self._json(500, {"status": "error", "message": str(e)})

        # --- 3. API ASSISTANT LEVEL ----------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/assistant":
            file_path = runtime_root / "assistant.json"
            level = 0
            if file_path.exists():
                try:
                    data = json.loads(file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                    level = data.get("level", 0)
                except Exception:
                    pass
            return self._json(200, {"level": level})

        # --- 4. API PROJECTS -----------------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/projects":
            projects_file = root / "repo" / "projects.json"
            projects = (
                json.loads(projects_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                if projects_file.exists()
                else {"projects": []}
            )
            return self._json(200, projects)

        # --- 5. FICHIERS STATIQUES DANS /catalogs --------------------------
        fs_path = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve()
        if str(fs_path).startswith(str(catalogs_root)) and fs_path.exists():
            data = fs_path.read_bytes()
            mime = (
                "application/json"
                if fs_path.suffix == ".json"
                else "application/octet-stream"
            )
            self.send_response(200)
            self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
            self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
            self.end_headers()
            self.wfile.write(data)
            return

        # --- 6. UI PRINCIPALE ----------------------------------------------
        if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"):
            candidates = [
                public_root / "index.html",
                root / "ui" / "index.html",
                root.parent / "ui" / "index.html",
            ]
            for idx in candidates:
                if idx.exists():
                    data = idx.read_bytes()
                    self.send_response(200)
                    self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                    self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                    self.end_headers()
                    self.wfile.write(data)
                    return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "UI not found"})

        # --- 7. PAGE ADMIN --------------------------------------------------
        if self.path in ("/admin", "/admin.html"):
            candidates = [
                public_root / "admin.html",
                root / "ui" / "admin.html",
                root.parent / "ui" / "admin.html",
            ]
            for ad in candidates:
                if ad.exists():
                    data = ad.read_bytes()
                    self.send_response(200)
                    self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                    self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                    self.end_headers()
                    self.wfile.write(data)
                    return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Admin UI not found"})

        # --- 8. FICHIERS STATIQUES /public/... -----------------------------
        if self.path.startswith("/public/"):
            p = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve()
            if p.is_file():
                mime = (
                    "text/html"
                    if p.suffix == ".html"
                    else "text/css"
                    if p.suffix == ".css"
                    else "application/javascript"
                    if p.suffix == ".js"
                    else "application/json"
                    if p.suffix == ".json"
                    else "application/octet-stream"
                )
                data = p.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Static not found"})

        # --- 9. FAVICON -----------------------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/favicon.ico":
            self.send_response(204)
            self.end_headers()
            return

        # --- 10. PAR DГүFAUT : 404 -----------------------------------------
        return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Not Found"})

        if self.path == "/api/document_types":
            cfg_path = root / "catalogs" / "document_types.json"
            if not cfg_path.exists():
                cfg_path = root.parent / "catalogs" / "document_types.json"
            try:
                data = json.loads(cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                items = [
                    {"id": t.get("ident") or t.get("id"), "label": t.get("label")}
                    for t in data.get("types", [])
                ]
                return self._json(200, {"types": items})
            except Exception as e:
                return self._json(500, {"status": "error", "message": str(e)})

        # --- 3. API ASSISTANT LEVEL ----------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/assistant":
            file_path = runtime_root / "assistant.json"
            level = 0
            if file_path.exists():
                try:
                    data = json.loads(file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                    level = data.get("level", 0)
                except Exception:
                    pass
            return self._json(200, {"level": level})

        # --- 4. API PROJECTS -----------------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/api/projects":
            projects_file = root / "repo" / "projects.json"
            projects = (
                json.loads(projects_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                if projects_file.exists()
                else {"projects": []}
            )
            return self._json(200, projects)

        # --- 5. FICHIERS STATIQUES DANS /catalogs --------------------------
        fs_path = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve()
        if str(fs_path).startswith(str(catalogs_root)) and fs_path.exists():
            data = fs_path.read_bytes()
            mime = (
                "application/json"
                if fs_path.suffix == ".json"
                else "application/octet-stream"
            )
            self.send_response(200)
            self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
            self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
            self.end_headers()
            self.wfile.write(data)
            return

        # --- 6. UI PRINCIPALE ----------------------------------------------
        if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"):
            candidates = [
                public_root / "index.html",
                root / "ui" / "index.html",
                root.parent / "ui" / "index.html",
            ]
            for idx in candidates:
                if idx.exists():
                    data = idx.read_bytes()
                    self.send_response(200)
                    self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                    self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                    self.end_headers()
                    self.wfile.write(data)
                    return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "UI not found"})

        # --- 7. PAGE ADMIN --------------------------------------------------
        if self.path in ("/admin", "/admin.html"):
            candidates = [
                public_root / "admin.html",
                root / "ui" / "admin.html",
                root.parent / "ui" / "admin.html",
            ]
            for ad in candidates:
                if ad.exists():
                    data = ad.read_bytes()
                    self.send_response(200)
                    self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
                    self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                    self.end_headers()
                    self.wfile.write(data)
                    return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Admin UI not found"})

        # --- 8. FICHIERS STATIQUES /public/... -----------------------------
        if self.path.startswith("/public/"):
            p = (root / self.path.lstrip("/")).resolve()
            if p.is_file():
                mime = (
                    "text/html"
                    if p.suffix == ".html"
                    else "text/css"
                    if p.suffix == ".css"
                    else "application/javascript"
                    if p.suffix == ".js"
                    else "application/json"
                    if p.suffix == ".json"
                    else "application/octet-stream"
                )
                data = p.read_bytes()
                self.send_response(200)
                self.send_header("Content-Type", mime)
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(data)
                return
            return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Static not found"})

        # --- 9. FAVICON -----------------------------------------------------
        if self.path == "/favicon.ico":
            self.send_response(204)
            self.end_headers()
            return

        # --- 10. PAR DГүFAUT : 404 -----------------------------------------
        return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Not Found"})

project_intake_pack/runtime/вҖҰ initialise la base SQLite (si choisie) et crГ©e les tables Vectors-Only minimales fixe le niveau dвҖҷassistance chaГ®ne immГ©diatement sur la crГ©ation du projet Agence via ton pipeline (si disponible), puis retourne un JSON clair et laisse ton server principal gГ©rer la suite (index/admin, upload, etc.) copie-colle ce fichier en remplaГ§ant ton bootstrap.py actuel.
