(SQLite) + structure Vectors-Only minimale - Lancement du pipeline "Agence" (si prГ©sent) """ import os, json, time, sqlite3, re, random, string, traceback, webbrowser from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime, timezone from threading import Thread # --- RГ©glages --------------------------------------------------------------- PORT = int(os.environ.get("BOOTSTRAP_PORT", "8081")) ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.resolve() PKG_ROOT = ROOT / "project_intake_pack" RUNTIME = PKG_ROOT / "runtime" CONFIG = PKG_ROOT / "config" PUBLIC = PKG_ROOT / "public" CATALOGS = PKG_ROOT / "catalogs" DB_DIR = PKG_ROOT / "db" RUN_DIR = PKG_ROOT / "run" LOG_DIR = PKG_ROOT / "runtime" # simple # Import facultatif du pipeline (si prГ©sent) def _import_run_pipeline(): try: from project_intake_pack.core.pipeline import run_pipeline return run_pipeline except Exception: return None RUN_PIPELINE = _import_run_pipeline() # --- Utils ------------------------------------------------------------------ def now_iso(): return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() def ensure_dirs(): for p in (RUNTIME, CONFIG, PUBLIC, CATALOGS, DB_DIR, RUN_DIR, LOG_DIR, PKG_ROOT / "uploads"): p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) def read_json(path: Path, default=None): try: return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) except Exception: return default if default is not None else {} def write_json(path: Path, obj): path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) path.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8") def append_log(line: str): LOG_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) (LOG_DIR / "bootstrap.log").write_text( (LOG_DIR / "bootstrap.log").read_text(encoding="utf-8") + f"[{now_iso()}] {line}\n" if (LOG_DIR / "bootstrap.log").exists() else f"[{now_iso()}] {line}\n", encoding="utf-8" ) def slugify(text: str) -> str: text = text.lower().strip() text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text) return re.sub(r"[\s-]+", "_", text) def create_vectors_only_sqlite(db_path: Path): """CrГ©e une structure Vectors-Only minimale (tables + index)""" conn = sqlite3.connect(str(db_path)) c = conn.cursor() c.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS objects (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY)""") c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS depends_on ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS related_to ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inherits_from ( src TEXT NOT NULL, target TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(src) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(target) REFERENCES objects(id), FOREIGN KEY(alias) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute(""" CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS labels ( label_id TEXT NOT NULL, lang TEXT NOT NULL, label_text TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(label_id, lang), FOREIGN KEY(label_id) REFERENCES objects(id) ) """) c.execute("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dep_u ON depends_on(src, target, COALESCE(alias,''))") c.execute("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rel_u ON related_to(src, target, COALESCE(alias,''))") c.execute("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inh_u ON inherits_from(src, target, COALESCE(alias,''))") c.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_labels_lang ON labels(lang)") conn.commit() conn.close() # --- Install page (HTML) ---------------------------------------------------- INSTALL_HTML = """ Installation вҖ” Agence

Installation de lвҖҷAgence

Renseigne lвҖҷadmin, la base, les modГЁles IA et le MGA. Ensuite, on crГ©e automatiquement le projet Agence.

1) Projet

2) Administrateur

3) IA вҖ” fournisseurs

4) Base de donnГ©es

Le fichier sera crГ©Г© dans project_intake_pack/db/

5) MGA

""" # --- Handler HTTP ----------------------------------------------------------- class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler): def _json(self, code:int, obj:dict): data = json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8") self.send_response(code) self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) def do_GET(self): try: # UI principale (formulaire dвҖҷinstall) if self.path in ("/", "/index.html"): data = INSTALL_HTML.encode("utf-8") self.send_response(200) self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8") self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(data))) self.end_headers() self.wfile.write(data) return # SantГ© if self.path == "/api/status": return self._json(200, {"status": "ok"}) # Fallback 404 return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Not Found"}) except Exception as e: append_log(f"[GET ERROR] {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}") return self._json(500, {"status": "error", "message": str(e)}) def do_POST(self): try: if self.path == "/api/install": ln = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0)) raw = self.rfile.read(ln) if ln else b"{}" payload = json.loads(raw.decode("utf-8")) # 1) Validation minimale project_name = payload.get("project", {}).get("name") or "Agence" admin = payload.get("admin") or {} if not admin.get("login") or not admin.get("password"): return self._json(400, {"status": "error", "message": "Admin login & password requis"}) # 2) Ecriture configuration ensure_dirs() write_json(RUNTIME / "system.json", payload) # tout le payload write_json(RUNTIME / "assistant.json", payload.get("assistant", {"level":0})) write_json(CONFIG / "mga.json", payload.get("mga", {})) # 3) Init BDD si SQLite default_db = None for db in payload.get("databases", []): if db.get("is_default"): default_db = db if not default_db and payload.get("databases"): default_db = payload["databases"][0] if default_db and default_db.get("type") == "sqlite": db_file = default_db.get("params", {}).get("file") or f"{slugify(project_name)}_database.db" db_path = DB_DIR / db_file create_vectors_only_sqlite(db_path) append_log(f"SQLite initialisГ©e: {db_path}") # 4) Lancement pipeline "Agence" (si disponible) created = [] notes = [] if RUN_PIPELINE: try: autonomy = int(payload.get("assistant", {}).get("level", 0)) rep = RUN_PIPELINE(ROOT, autonomy=autonomy, scenario_ident="website_bootstrap") # rep: dict avec created/updated/notesвҖҰ (selon implГ©mentation existante) created = rep.get("created", []) notes = rep.get("notes", []) append_log("[pipeline] Agence exГ©cutГ©e") except Exception as e: notes.append({"error": str(e)}) append_log(f"[pipeline error] {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}") else: notes.append({"info": "pipeline non disponible вҖ” config enregistrГ©e seulement"}) # 5) Redirection cГҙtГ© client : laisse ton server principal prendre le relais return self._json(200, { "status": "ok", "created": created, "notes": notes, "redirect": "/admin" }) # Fallback return self._json(404, {"status": "error", "message": "Not Found"}) except Exception as e: append_log(f"[POST ERROR] {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}") return self._json(500, {"status": "error", "message": str(e)}) # --- Main ------------------------------------------------------------------- def main(): ensure_dirs() httpd = HTTPServer(("", PORT), Handler) def _run(): print(f"\nрҹҡҖ Bootstrap en Г©coute sur http://localhost:{PORT}") print(f"рҹ“Ғ Dossier runtime: {RUNTIME}") httpd.serve_forever() Thread(target=_run, daemon=True).start() time.sleep(0.5) try: webbrowser.open_new_tab(f"http://localhost:{PORT}/") except Exception: pass try: while True: time.sleep(1) except KeyboardInterrupt: print("\nArrГӘtвҖҰ") if __name__ == "__main__": main() Comment tester lancer le bootstrap bashCopier le codepkill -f "bootstrap.py" || true python3 bootstrap.py вҶ’ Г§a ouvre http://localhost:8081/ remplir : Admin (login + password obligatoires) DB: SQLite (laisse agence_database.db) IA: fournisseur + clГ© (optionnel pour lвҖҷinstant) MGA: base_url (ex: http://localhost:9000 si tu as un MGA), token si besoin Niveau dвҖҷassistance cliquer вҖңInstaller & crГ©er lвҖҷAgenceвҖқ вҶ’ le script : enregistre la config dans project_intake_pack/runtime/вҖҰ crГ©e la base SQLite et la structure Vectors-Only appelle run_pipeline(..., scenario_ident="website_bootstrap") si prГ©sent renvoie { "status":"ok", "redirect":"/admin" } ton serveur principal (python3 -m project_intake_pack.http.server) peut ensuite : lire project_intake_pack/runtime/system.json (config) afficher /admin (liste des projets, crГ©ation de nouveaux projets via upload comme avant) OГ№ sont stockГ©es les infos project_intake_pack/runtime/system.json : tout le payload (admin, db, IA, MGAвҖҰ) project_intake_pack/runtime/assistant.json : { "level": 0|1 } project_intake_pack/config/mga.json : { "base_url": "...", "token": "..." } project_intake_pack/db/agence_database.db : base SQLite (si SQLite choisi) Pourquoi Г§a colle Г  ta logique Tout est objet / Vectors-Only : la structure minimale SQLite est prГӘte (tables objects, depends_on, related_to, inherits_from, labels). MGA dynamique : les infos MGA sont dans les fichiers runtime/config, pas codГ©es en dur. Ton server/pipeline rГ©cupГЁre config/mga.json. ChaГ®nage automatique : le bootstrap dГ©clenche la crГ©ation du projet Agence via le pipeline si dispo (sinon, il nвҖҷГ©choue pas : il te laisse lвҖҷadmin opГ©rationnel). Modulaire : bootstrap reste un module Г  part (install), rГ©utilisable pour dвҖҷautres projets ou rГ©-installations.
